transcriptEntries.content:
The direction or in other words the bias 
 of price is arguably the most important 
 because knowing the bias allows you to

know what the next target in price is. 
 And when you know the next target so 
 your bias is very clear that it makes it

a lot easier to profit from that. So the 
 way you can see that is that the bias 
 essentially is the foundation. 
 Everything else like for example an

entry is built on top of that 
 foundation. Now if the foundation is 
 weak then the entry might be weak and

the entry might also fall resulting into 
 more losses. So the bias understanding 
 the next target is crucial. Now in this

video I'm extremely confident that if 
 you follow along with the full video you 
 are going to absolutely master the bias 
 and this is going to be our road map

towards achieving the goal of mastering 
 the bias. First of all we are going to 
 go over what is price moving towards.

Second of all we are going to go over 
 the specific rules. And number three, we 
 have knowing the bias. Number four is

arguably one of the most important is 
 when do you switch bias? So when are we 
 looking at a reversal in our bias? And

last but not least, of course, how can 
 we profit from it? So when to look for 
 an entry. So step number one, what is

price moving towards? Now before we dive 
 into those technicals in just a second, 
 you should really understand the

following. I've personally always quite 
 disliked how subjective trading can be. 
 So, in my opinion, there always needs to

be some form of objective guidelines. I 
 always use the 80/20 rule. 80% of the 
 trading plan should somewhat be

objective. 20% can potentially be 
 subjective. So, that's why the way we 
 determine our bias and also what we're

going to discuss in this video is for 
 the most part completely objective. 
 Because for me, objectivity leads to

clarity. When something is clearly 
 defined, we are far more likely to be on 
 the exact same page of understanding.

Think of it like a language. If I for 
 example land in Brazil, I don't speak a 
 word Portuguese. So I could start

blaming everyone around me that they're 
 not making any sense or I can realize I 
 just don't know the definition of the

words they are using yet, their 
 language. So it's important to realize 
 that what we're going to do is not 
 rocket science. You're just going to

learn a language and the specific words 
 that we're using to determine how you 
 can get to a certain bias, how you can

get to certain targets. And that leads 
 us to step number one. Because what is 
 price moving towards now the objective

definition price is always moving 
 towards a PD ray. That's it. So the

target in price so what price is moving 
 towards is always going to be a PD ray. 
 But it's our job to figure out which PDA

we are moving towards next. Now first of 
 course let's not get ahead of ourselves. 
 We're going to dive into that in some 
 later steps. But first we should then

understand what is a PDA or what are the 
 PDAs that we are talking about. So let's 
 quickly go over the PDAs again. First of

all, of course, we have a fair value 
 gap. I think most of us by now know what 
 a fair value gap is. It's a three candle

pattern. You have the first candle doing 
 whatever the second candle right here is 
 a body closure above the first candle 
 high. And because it's a body closure

above the first candle high, it leaves 
 this body part right here. Then once the 
 third candle closes, does not trade back

into the first candle high right there. 
 Then we have this three candle pattern. 
 And this three candle pattern right here

is a fair value gap. So this is a 
 bullish for value gap and this is a 
 bearish fair value gap. Again, like I 
 mentioned, I think most of us have a

good idea of what a fair value gap is. 
 But most of us don't know the specific 
 rules that we use for fair value gaps,

which is exactly something we're going 
 to dive into in the next step, which is 
 very interesting in my opinion. But 
 before we go over that, of course, we

have two more pity rays. So the second 
 type of pity rate that we have is swing 
 points. And swing points are swing highs

and swing lows. So, it's also a three 
 candle pattern. This right here is a 
 swing high. The first candle right here,

second candle sticks out with a wick at 
 the top right there. And the third 
 candle, once the third candle closes,

does not trade back above the second 
 candle high right there. Then this is a 
 swing high. Same for example, that this

is a swing low right here where it's 
 inversed and instead the wick in the 
 middle is sticking out at the bottom.

So, this for example, right here at this 
 moment in time is a swing high right 
 there. Now for these swing points there

are also specific rules but again let's 
 first understand what is the third PDA. 
 The third PDA is a fair value area. A

fair value area simply said and all you 
 should know for now is that it's 
 essentially the retracement before we 
 continued higher. So price moves similar

to these swings. You have a swing 
 higher, you have a swing lower and you 
 have a swing higher again. The swing 
 from this point to that point right

there. That's the fair value area. So 
 this right here is the fair value area 
 right here that we can retrace back into

to potentially continue higher from. So 
 for example, this right here is also a 
 fair value area sitting right here. Then

this right here is also a fair value 
 area right there. Now what you should 
 know is that I'm marking out the bodies

right here of the fair value area. And 
 at this case I'm marking out the wick. 
 when the wick so the highest point of

the fair value area is exactly 
 overlapping with a fair value gap right 
 there you mark out the wick if that's 
 not the case so for example right here

the highest point of the fair value 
 areas not directly overlapping with a 
 fair value gap to the right and this on 
 the same time frame then what you do

instead you mark out the highest bodies 
 right there of the fair value area 
 instead that's going to be the sensitive

area instead now when we start marking 
 out these rays so we have this fair 
 value area we also have this larger fair

cardList.title: Capture ideas & knowledge
cardList.content: {"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"heading","attrs":{"id":"385c0db4-e682-4e0f-8f9f-0a89a2bd23e1","level":1},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"strong"},{"type":"link","attrs":{"href":"https://wiki.heptabase.com/three-ways-to-make-sense-of-your-fleeting-thoughts-in-journal","edited":false,"title":null,"data-internal-href":null}}],"text":"Capture ideas & knowledge"}]},{"type":"image","attrs":{"id":"cd4501d6-8af8-4d0e-a089-fe1526cd7646","src":"https://i.imgur.com/8MemJYd.png","fileId":null,"alt":null,"title":null,"width":null,"originalHeight":2160,"originalWidth":3456,"alignment":"center","reference":null}},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"id":"fb61a823-61a0-4969-a516-d60461fe6b6d","level":2},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Step Overview"}]},{"type":"bullet_list_item","attrs":{"id":"84c1fcd7-88ec-4997-ac21-be6327592a50","folded":false,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"1b8b47d0-6348-4e69-a1bc-d9067378a6a2"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"**When you have a clear topic:**"},{"type":"hard_break"},{"type":"text","text":"Start by adding a single note card to your whiteboard and keep collecting information in it. Once you have sufficient content, break this card into multiple smaller concept cards and visually organize the relationships between them on the whiteboard."}]}]},{"type":"bullet_list_item","attrs":{"id":"90e0f1a5-78de-4491-97b4-b689739eaa95","folded":false,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"a491a078-8b47-4fe2-9af8-da796aa419d8"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"**When you don't have a clear topic:**"},{"type":"hard_break"},{"type":"text","text":"Quickly capture scattered ideas or inspirations using the Journal (on desktop: click Journal on the left sidebar; on mobile: use the calendar button or voice notes). When revisiting past journal entries, right-click the whiteboard and select \"Calendar\" to instantly place all journal cards from your chosen timeframe onto the whiteboard for review."}]}]}]}

cardList.title: Ik wil Kyara Kamer wat bij leren over AI
Learn & research a topic
cardList.content: {"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"heading","attrs":{"id":"44e853ea-bf8a-4349-ab70-0eaa8e37c939","level":1},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"strong"},{"type":"link","attrs":{"href":"https://wiki.heptabase.com/the-best-way-to-acquire-knowledge-from-readings","edited":false,"title":null,"data-internal-href":null}}],"text":"Learn & research a topic"}]},{"type":"image","attrs":{"id":"181e447a-a650-4429-acab-3e536e85a6f5","src":"https://i.imgur.com/5BBYNVa.png","fileId":null,"alt":null,"title":null,"width":null,"originalHeight":2160,"originalWidth":3456,"alignment":"center","reference":null}},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"id":"73393ce0-6ebd-4de6-b195-5907aa5ffc33","level":2},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Step Overview"}]},{"type":"numbered_list_item","attrs":{"id":"168b6671-9a33-4453-8498-39aca1feadfb","order":null,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"6952813a-beab-44f1-99e1-547a44a1b8df"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"When breaking down a book's notes into multiple \"concept cards\" on a whiteboard, ensure each card contains only one clear concept. Summarize the content of each card with a concise title, allowing your future self to grasp it at a glance."}]}]},{"type":"numbered_list_item","attrs":{"id":"d8aed72a-25b6-4ea8-81f6-bb71d7221f48","order":null,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"9bf97555-6d32-48b2-861c-870c70d0c524"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Once you have multiple concept cards, you can link related cards together, group them into sections, and give each section a clear, intuitive name, building a visual structure of your knowledge."}]}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"id":"7dc5cd6f-a424-4eb2-bbdc-84449374687a","level":2},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Core Philosophy"}]},{"type":"blockquote","attrs":{"id":"c321c3f4-50c7-4cc1-a51b-ca34f017fdf4"},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"aa9b196b-65d6-4e85-b2e8-e58696bce97f"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"The purpose of visualizing notes is to gain a deep understanding of what you've learned. If all of your notes are very long and you don't break down the knowledge into smaller parts, the understanding you can gain from visualization will be very limited. Real deep understanding doesn't come from the \"relationship between two books\" but from the \"relationship between all the concepts in these two books.\""}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"24cd0d6b-e6f0-4ed3-940d-96146bd07164"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"You can only gain a deep understanding of the topics you care about through visual note-taking when you atomize your notes. Atomic note-taking does not mean you cannot have long notes. It means that each concept card should only contain one concept and be supported by its content. To ensure clarity, you should always describe the concept in one sentence and use that sentence as the title of the concept card."}]}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"id":"ddc5b77b-ea16-4ca8-b5b8-f6fbc73bd955","level":2},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Video Tutorial"}]},{"type":"video","attrs":{"id":"26733593-32d0-4615-8342-5071714f1a4b","fileId":null,"url":"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HgvR2QkfwG0","source":"video","width":"100%","alignment":"center","originalWidth":null,"originalHeight":null,"reference":null}}]}

cardList.title: 💭PRODUCT MUST-HAVE VALIDATOR-prompt
cardList.content:
{"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"heading","attrs":{"id":"8120e796-0d68-48c3-924d-2178e3a5f2bc","level":1},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"💭PRODUCT MUST-HAVE VALIDATOR-prompt"}]},{"type":"code_block","attrs":{"id":"bb40e0ef-516b-4263-a3eb-677824097f5b","params":"plain"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"[Prompt Name: PRODUCT MUST-HAVE VALIDATOR]

### 1. Clear Context
You are an expert in product research and validation for Direct-to-Consumer (D2C) e-commerce.  
Your task is to validate a product idea against strict "must-have" criteria and supportive "nice-to-have" factors to determine if it has strong potential for testing and scaling.  

### 2. Role Assignment
Act as a D2C product research strategist who evaluates ideas quickly and objectively, highlighting both strengths and red flags.  

### 3. Explicit Instructions
1. Review the provided product.  
2. Validate it against the **must-have criteria** below:  
   - Problem-solving OR Desire-based (must be clearly one of the two)  
   - Wow factor (scroll-stopping, clear in 3 seconds)  
   - Clear target audience  
   - Good margin potential (min. 3x markup)  
   - No red flags (logistics, claims, trademark issues)  
   - Reliable supply  
   - Ad creatable (easy to visualise in ads)  
3. Then check the product against **nice-to-have criteria**:  
   - Not oversaturated (room for positioning)  
   - Upsell/cross-sell potential  
   - Scalable (variants, international potential)  
   - Blue Ocean angle (fresh positioning opportunity)  
   - Repeat purchase potential  
   - Evergreen demand (not a short-lived trend)  
4. For each must-have, explain briefly whether it is met.  
5. For each nice-to-have, assign a **score from 0–5**:  
   - 0 = Not present at all  
   - 1 = Very weak  
   - 3 = Moderate / possible but unproven  
   - 5 = Strongly present and validated  
   - ⚠ Missing = Information not available  
6. Give a final status: **"Passed"** or **"Failed"** (a product fails if one or more must-haves fail, regardless of nice-to-haves).  

### 4. Output Specification
- Structure: Two Markdown tables.  
  1. **Must-Haves Table**  
     - **Criteria** | **Explanation** | **Status (Passed/Failed)**  
  2. **Nice-to-Haves Table**  
     - **Criteria** | **Explanation** | **Score (0–5 or ⚠ Missing)**  
- Language: [nl-NL / en-US / …]  
- Formality: [formal / informal]  
- Voice: [you-form / u-form / …]  
- Style notes: concise, practical, avoid jargon.  
- Present the entire output inside a code block.  

### 5. Constraints and Boundaries
- Be fully objective, even if the product sounds appealing.  
- Highlight potential deal-breakers clearly.  
- Do not skip any criterion.  
- If information is **missing**, mark it as **“⚠ Missing”**.  
- Do not invent or guess — only infer if absolutely logical, and label as **“(inferred)”**.  
- A single failed must-have = **overall fail**.  
- Nice-to-haves only strengthen validation but are not mandatory.  

### Input
[PLACEHOLDER – paste the product idea here  
Provide at least:  
- Product name or description  
Optional but helpful:  
- Pricing info, supply chain notes, review snippets, technical details]  
"}]}]}

cardList.content: {"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"heading","attrs":{"id":"9a971bda-e2d9-426b-b6ba-ebf5c76c64f0","level":1},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Whiteboard"}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"id":"5fa3a1a6-dbe0-48e6-8a50-8e0d87e94da7","level":2},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Concept and Use Case"}]},{"type":"bullet_list_item","attrs":{"id":"eac4d869-0a24-462d-87ce-74df2c851a2d","folded":false,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"b3d9a028-35c1-4514-b9fe-bd02aedecb4e"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"A "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"strong"}],"text":"whiteboard"},{"type":"text","text":" is your space for thinking. Consider it as an unlimited desktop for placing cards to help you learn and research the topics you care about. When you have many cards on a whiteboard, you can create sub-whiteboards for researching subtopics under the main topic."}]}]},{"type":"bullet_list_item","attrs":{"id":"f306c194-1c6d-49de-aadb-c50d91db397f","folded":false,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"9d61927d-ca15-49a5-8b8d-52ff33f17870"},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"strong"}],"text":"Whiteboards do not own cards"},{"type":"text","text":". All cards belong to the Card Library. When you are researching a topic on the whiteboard, you can import related cards from the Card Library and place them on the whiteboard. You can also create new cards on the whiteboard, and these cards will be directly stored in the Card Library."}]},{"type":"image","attrs":{"id":"270fffcd-37f0-45e0-a722-7a7f279ea3f9","src":"https://i.imgur.com/EDOHs5C.png","fileId":null,"alt":null,"title":null,"width":null,"originalHeight":2160,"originalWidth":3456,"alignment":"center","reference":null}}]},{"type":"bullet_list_item","attrs":{"id":"e4ce784e-0f3e-47ba-9e7a-3ee7e6dca0ba","folded":false,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"4db94a0b-dff7-4643-a27f-ac83e92ee66e"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"The same card can be placed on multiple whiteboards at the same time. This is similar to how our brain works - the same concept or knowledge can appear under different topics. You can see in the card's Info section which whiteboards the card appears on. If you click on a whiteboard name, it will automatically open the whiteboard and focus on the location of the card, allowing you to easily recall the thinking context of the card."}]},{"type":"image","attrs":{"id":"11e231cf-016f-4ff1-b959-67ef43ecc93b","src":"https://i.imgur.com/s0lQhWO.png","fileId":null,"alt":null,"title":null,"width":null,"originalHeight":1322,"originalWidth":2136,"alignment":"center","reference":null}}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"id":"1b0034d5-2b76-42bf-b985-a25ce2a9437a","level":2},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Basic Operations"}]},{"type":"bullet_list_item","attrs":{"id":"4b371d8d-7769-40d5-ac0d-751da14000b3","folded":false,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"24731754-0782-4425-9110-a2ef997dd6cd"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"You can right-click in the blank space of the whiteboard to create different types of objects to help you think. These include: creating cards to record ideas and knowledge; creating text to capture fleeting thoughts; creating mind maps to quickly brainstorm and clarify your thinking; creating journals to plan for the next week; creating sections to group whiteboard objects; and creating sub-whiteboards to organize knowledge of sub-topics."}]},{"type":"image","attrs":{"id":"2c6e5e7d-639e-437d-8dac-53f1ddf25ac9","src":"https://i.imgur.com/pf6grLg.png","fileId":null,"alt":null,"title":null,"width":null,"originalHeight":608,"originalWidth":682,"alignment":"center","reference":null}}]},{"type":"bullet_list_item","attrs":{"id":"ca9d8f4f-9b1c-40d2-8540-1bb3bd1fa24e","folded":false,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"6247f3ab-93aa-4c91-a22d-9a2e7d4b777a"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"You can right-click on whiteboard objects to select the advanced operations you want to perform on them. These include changing color, activating mindmap mode, exporting files, viewing edit history, adding tags, moving to other whiteboards, opening as new tabs, etc."}]},{"type":"image","attrs":{"id":"eeddc4ef-9ff9-4d57-a675-f148a4f02635","src":"https://i.imgur.com/jLxRsRo.png","fileId":null,"alt":null,"title":null,"width":null,"originalHeight":2008,"originalWidth":2814,"alignment":"center","reference":null}}]},{"type":"bullet_list_item","attrs":{"id":"4976c67b-c8f0-4358-9fc5-af02a39b0651","folded":false,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"b4bd4234-b6aa-428e-8cdd-6e14b7f9bd37"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"If you want to change the position and color of multiple whiteboard objects at once, or perform advanced batch operations on them, you can click the blank space of the whiteboard and drag a selection box to select multiple objects all at once. "}]},{"type":"image","attrs":{"id":"9bf87345-a5e5-43c4-8f75-f8f398d9ce23","src":"https://i.imgur.com/7qtdKfq.png","fileId":null,"alt":null,"title":null,"width":null,"originalHeight":2160,"originalWidth":3456,"alignment":"center","reference":null}}]}]}

ideas."}]}]},{"type":"bullet_list_item","attrs":{"id":"5e3b48cd-2abe-4a03-bd11-0df2796f60a9","folded":false,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"a6651e6a-6ce7-41eb-90c2-4a24335b3e3e"},"content":[{"type":"card","attrs":{"cardId":"266e38e9-9517-4979-9029-fdee41b98b02"}},{"type":"text","text":": Therefore, the UI logic of Heptabase is similar to a browser, rather than a traditional folder."}]},{"type":"bullet_list_item","attrs":{"id":"3127430a-ea2d-418a-8e10-053a945d8d98","folded":false,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"8700251b-1385-40db-ad64-9a0fa3da4caa"},"content":[{"type":"card","attrs":{"cardId":"da691cc0-1301-4ca7-a56f-098197d2e3c8"}},{"type":"text","text":": Tabs and bookmarks of the browser."}]}]},{"type":"bullet_list_item","attrs":{"id":"2094729b-f473-43ee-a202-e9207c6a2e10","folded":false,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"5204439f-2d13-45e4-b9fb-3732b48ba3a6"},"content":[{"type":"card","attrs":{"cardId":"34b82138-6cb8-43b9-beaa-170182cdaadb"}},{"type":"text","text":": Plugins of the browser."}]}]},{"type":"bullet_list_item","attrs":{"id":"acca27ec-b987-45ad-93ee-a5fc20f924f7","folded":false,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"22f8b5e9-9c87-4d10-9213-4eb6f3d89e50"},"content":[{"type":"card","attrs":{"cardId":"e692744c-b924-450b-9722-f5584a5ac482"}},{"type":"text","text":": Search tool of the browser."}]}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"id":"50fe78c4-84a6-43d9-90cc-41dc6ed5c386","level":2},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"More about Heptabase"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"564d873e-bcff-46a7-b523-b551a87a784d"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"The above is all you need to know to get started with Heptabase. cardList.title: Right Sidebar
cardList.content: {"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"heading","attrs":{"id":"8cc71645-8948-4e91-9f79-e85cb27cd11f","level":1},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Right Sidebar"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"89e0567c-685c-44c1-915b-5746bf24a2a6"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"When you open a Heptabase tab, you can open the right sidebar from the top right corner of this tab, which will have all the tools that this tab can use. Here is an introduction to each tool:"}]},{"type":"bullet_list_item","attrs":{"id":"94bde330-40e1-4c5f-bc92-9dd0345c1dd5","folded":false,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"3797d45a-61ca-469c-9f11-bd40eaf2595b"},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"strong"}],"text":"References:"},{"type":"text","text":" When you open a tab, you can open multiple cards or webpages on the right side to cross-reference with the main content of the tab. For example, when you're writing an article, you can open the knowledge cards that the article will refer to on the right side."}]},{"type":"image","attrs":{"id":"801ae211-a818-4a29-915e-b7aa1f31c915","src":"https://i.imgur.com/XOgICYO.png","fileId":null,"alt":null,"title":null,"width":null,"originalHeight":2160,"originalWidth":3456,"alignment":"center","reference":null}}]},{"type":"bullet_list_item","attrs":{"id":"abc82415-210e-4ccd-a2af-5ccb3c59414f","folded":false,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"9b4141ca-9934-4f49-82a1-e84e327fa5f0"},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"strong"}],"text":"Whiteboard Location:"},{"type":"text","text":" When you open a card tab, you can see which whiteboards this card appears on and its positions within them."}]},{"type":"image","attrs":{"id":"d1cf74f9-0649-4b0d-9e4b-74eb8b173f23","src":"https://i.imgur.com/J90baR6.png","fileId":null,"alt":null,"title":null,"width":null,"originalHeight":2160,"originalWidth":3456,"alignment":"center","reference":null}}]},{"type":"bullet_list_item","attrs":{"id":"606754c2-085c-4304-aef3-97fcd1b51186","folded":false,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"abf70ee5-6e00-4984-aaef-bc37365b2f29"},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"strong"}],"text":"Insight:"},{"type":"text","text":" When you open a note card, if it contains a large amount of text (e.g., long articles, book excerpts, transcripts), you can use the AI Insight feature to quickly grasp all the key insights from the content. This feature breaks the original text into chunks of approximately 300 words and summarizes each chunk with one key insight. Each insight can be traced back to its original content blocks, and you can also drag these insights onto a whiteboard for further sense-making. This feature is currently in an early beta phase, with limited usage quotas each month."}]},{"type":"image","attrs":{"id":"068bb224-5011-4c0d-b229-0c770e37220a","src":"https://i.imgur.com/pYJdnDK.png","fileId":null,"alt":null,"title":null,"width":null,"originalHeight":2160,"originalWidth":3456,"alignment":"center","reference":null}},{"type":"video","attrs":{"id":"3b66769d-0c7f-47a2-98d7-f13173a5da72","fileId":null,"url":"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uYGqvEksAz8","source":"video","width":"100%","alignment":"center","originalWidth":null,"originalHeight":null,"reference":null}},{"type":"video","attrs":{"id":"e611c406-2d4b-4308-a1d7-335c778c2920","fileId":null,"url":"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xoj4-Yahyuo","source":"video","width":"100%","alignment":"center","originalWidth":null,"originalHeight":null,"reference":null}}]},{"type":"bullet_list_item","attrs":{"id":"ecba8585-37cb-4604-9bfd-8cb9de4bc092","folded":false,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"ae099676-5b6a-4922-b3ad-544eef0eebac"},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"strong"}],"text":"Table of Content:"},{"type":"text","text":" When you open a card or whiteboard tab, you can see the outline of this tab. For cards, this displays the hierarchical relationship of different titles; for whiteboards, this displays the hierarchical relationship of different sections."}]},{"type":"image","attrs":{"id":"c569eb00-053e-4df4-963b-fea1f66a9d15","src":"https://i.imgur.com/WhZZVTd.png","fileId":null,"alt":null,"title":null,"width":null,"originalHeight":996,"originalWidth":2938,"alignment":"center","reference":null}}]},{"type":"bullet_list_item","attrs":{"id":"769ad41a-5440-4198-a39d-dd08c95a0bc3","folded":false,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"9e321649-6938-46c4-8dc6-33591e311e1a"},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"strong"}],"text":"Info:"},{"type":"text","text":" When you open a card tab, you can see the word count of the card, its creation time, backlinks from all paragraphs that mention this card, all whiteboards where this card appears, and all tags and properties that this card has."}]},{"type":"image","attrs":{"id":"8dbc1f7a-3509-4b92-a409-289376cb352d","src":"https://i.imgur.com/ucQKtE2.png","fileId":null,"alt":null,"title":null,"width":null,"originalHeight":2160,"originalWidth":3456,"alignment":"center","reference":null}}]},{"type":"bullet_list_item","attrs":{"id":"a01c2fd6-454f-4ccd-bcfc-6a3323887237","folded":false,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"2d11c69a-0117-440a-ab61-2e2569c73e8a"},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"strong"}],"text":"Highlight:"},{"type":"text","text":" When you open a PDF card, you can see all the highlights and annotations of this card."}]},{"type":"image","attrs":{"id":"368413cd-0854-42ec-b961-9191a81e2a74","src":"https://i.imgur.com/mIRb4ba.png","fileId":null,"alt":null,"title":null,"width":null,"originalHeight":2160,"originalWidth":3456,"alignment":"center","reference":null}}]},{"type":"bullet_list_item","attrs":{"id":"e74e89b2-b1bf-45d8-a563-f16d920d4bd9","folded":false,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"4dabacb1-ff96-47a3-941e-1cd74bc2a77d"},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"strong"}],"text":"Task:"},{"type":"text","text":" When you open a Journal card, you can see all the todos that are due on this day and have not been completed yet."}]},{"type":"image","attrs":{"id":"883f4fb6-7d5e-4a49-beaa-73d13657ae93","src":"https://i.imgur.com/g4kw7rH.png","fileId":null,"alt":null,"title":null,"width":null,"originalHeight":2160,"originalWidth":3456,"alignment":"center","reference":null}}]}]}

cardList.title: Structure of a Proper ChatGPT Prompt
cardList.content: {"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"heading","attrs":{"id":"ddea7ffa-2732-4d8f-98ee-84fc13634018","level":1},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Structure of a Proper ChatGPT Prompt"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"30bace03-f2b1-471b-bd73-4d558bbadd4a"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Want ChatGPT or the newly released GPT-5 to give accurate, coherent, and useful answers?"},{"type":"hard_break"},{"type":"text","text":"The secret is to build your prompt with these 6 core components:  "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"eda7df95-0b80-4528-8c97-f363bd604cec"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"1/ Role – Tell the AI what role to take (teacher, expert, advisor, etc.)."},{"type":"hard_break"},{"type":"text","text":"2/ Task – Clearly state what you want the AI to do."},{"type":"hard_break"},{"type":"text","text":"3/ Context – Provide background information or scenarios so the AI fully understands the request."},{"type":"hard_break"},{"type":"text","text":"4/ Reasoning – Ask it to analyze, compare, or verify before answering."},{"type":"hard_break"},{"type":"text","text":"5/ Output Format – Specify how you want the result presented (table, bullet points, paragraph, etc.)."},{"type":"hard_break"},{"type":"text","text":"6/ Stop Condition – Set boundaries so the answer is concise and not rambling.  "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"d620fb07-93cd-4c41-ad3b-13cf18abe658"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"When a prompt includes all 6 components, ChatGPT becomes a powerful assistant, delivering responses that are precise, clear, and highly valuable."}]},{"type":"image","attrs":{"id":"6f857137-2c86-4bda-abfe-0826f15c0440","src":null,"fileId":"094859d7-4039-4606-9d67-635a33fd6afe","alt":null,"title":null,"width":null,"originalHeight":400,"originalWidth":267,"alignment":"center","reference":null}}]}

cardList.title: 💭Prompt for Competitor Research
cardList.content:
{"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"heading","attrs":{"id":"4d6bfc34-1ac1-4323-bdd9-17b985c8d3d6","level":1},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"💭Prompt for Competitor Research"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"60b1f73d-92bf-4d6a-a382-9b54c0376f65"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"INPUT: List of URL from competitors"},{"type":"hard_break"}]},{"type":"code_block","attrs":{"id":"e1fa48ff-3374-48ca-a301-ca73104c8ea3","params":"plain"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"You are an expert in competitor research for Direct-to-Consumer (D2C) e-commerce.  
I will give you a product idea. Your task is to analyse competitor activity in my target country and compare it to the big benchmark countries.  

**Target country:** [placeholder]  
**Big countries inside EU:** Germany (DE), France (FR)  
**Big countries outside EU:** United States (US), United Kingdom (UK), Australia (AU)  

**Instructions:**  
1. Identify competitors actively selling or advertising this product in each country.  
2. Analyse how they position themselves:  
   - Pricing and offers  
   - Angles and messaging (problem-solving vs. desire-based, sophistication stage)  
   - Funnel setup (landing pages, advertorials, UGC, reviews)  
   - Creative style (UGC, lifestyle, social proof, etc.)  
3. Compare my target country to the benchmark countries:  
   - Is the market earlier or later in sophistication stage?  
   - Which successful angles from big countries are not yet used in my country?  
   - Where are the gaps (white space) to position differently?  
4. Present the output in a clear Markdown table with these columns:  
   - Country  
   - Key competitors  
   - Positioning & angles  
   - Sophistication stage  
   - White space opportunities  

**Product to analyse:**  
"[Insert product name here]"
"}]}]}

Philips Evnia 27M2N8500 is een stijlvolle 27-inch QD-OLED monitor met een verbluffende verversingssnelheid van 360 Hz, ideaal voor competitieve gamers. Dankzij de diepe OLED-zwarten, brede kleurdekking (98,5% DCI-P3) en HDR-ondersteuning levert het scherm een indrukwekkende beeldkwaliteit. Het witte ontwerp met Ambiglow-verlichting oogt modern en onderscheidend. De ergonomische standaard biedt veel verstelopties, al ontbreekt pivot-functionaliteit. Hoewel tekst niet altijd scherp oogt en de OSD joystick echt wel onhandig geplaatst is, zijn dit kleine minpunten binnen het totaalplaatje. De monitor is ook geschikt voor contentcreatie en mediaconsumptie. Met een prijs rond de €600 biedt de Evnia een uitstekende balans tussen prestaties, design en functionaliteit voor gamers en creatievelingen die een snelle, elegante monitor zoeken."}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"60682472-9bad-4e4d-9501-63af7f42409c"},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"link","attrs":{"href":"https://tweakers.net/pricewatch/2106096/philips-evnia-27m2n8500-00-wit.html","edited":false,"title":null,"data-internal-href":null}}],"text":"Vanaf "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"strong"},{"type":"link","attrs":{"href":"https://tweakers.net/pricewatch/2106096/philips-evnia-27m2n8500-00-wit.html","edited":false,"title":null,"data-internal-href":null}}],"text":"€ 590,-"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"c14a79db-bf20-42c2-bfc7-a77973e96000"}},{"type":"image","attrs":{"id":"934336c2-87ab-4aa8-91e5-16dd8843e4e8","src":"https://tweakers.net/i/5sLyJhaF101_1KLRfdFMBjx1eSM=/fit-in/188x141/filters:fill(white):strip_exif()/i/2007172904.webp?f=thumblarge","fileId":null,"alt":"ASUS ROG Flow Z13 (2025) GZ302EA-RU014W (Qwerty toetsenbord) Zwart review door AlkoMasterz","title":null,"width":null,"originalHeight":141,"originalWidth":188,"alignment":"center","reference":null}},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"6cc92142-6bc1-4b31-ad6c-2af90a20109b"},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"link","attrs":{"href":"https://tweakers.net/productreview/349876/asus-rog-flow-z13-2025-gz302ea-ru014w-qwerty-toetsenbord-zwart.html","edited":false,"title":null,"data-internal-href":null}}],"text":"ASUS ROG Flow Z13 (2025) GZ302EA-RU014W (Qwerty toetsenbord) Zwart review door AlkoMasterz"}]},{"type":"blockquote","attrs":{"id":"061ee581-5cf3-4b41-b81b-90b510b0ed95"},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"0e5a1d24-e39f-4493-bb3c-00c12129e33b"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"De Asus ROG Flow Z13 (2025) is een vreemd wezen. Niet vreemd in de zin van ‘wat moet ik hiermee’, maar eerder als een soort technologische shapeshifter – een apparaat dat weigert zich in een hokje te laten stoppen. Het ziet eruit als een tablet, typt als een ultrabook, presteert als een gaminglaptop en klinkt af en toe als een stille monnik in een bibliotheek. En net als je denkt dat je hem begrijpt, zet hij z’n RGB-venster aan alsof hij uit een cyberpunk-animatie is weggelopen."}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"b617a60c-6ffd-456f-abd6-1dc1e6529bc0"},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"link","attrs":{"href":"https://tweakers.net/pricewatch/2158630/asus-rog-flow-z13-2025-gz302ea-ru014w-qwerty-toetsenbord-zwart.html","edited":false,"title":null,"data-internal-href":null}}],"text":"Vanaf "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"strong"},{"type":"link","attrs":{"href":"https://tweakers.net/pricewatch/2158630/asus-rog-flow-z13-2025-gz302ea-ru014w-qwerty-toetsenbord-zwart.html","edited":false,"title":null,"data-internal-href":null}}],"text":"€ 2.299,-"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"f71d1a7b-4f35-4a40-85b6-2ac3e34370d7"}},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"3d515e73-91d2-421b-9d17-0c8e473b9329"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Source: "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"link","attrs":{"href":"https://tweakers.net/","edited":false,"title":null,"data-internal-href":null}}],"text":"https://tweakers.net/"}]}]}

cardList.content: {"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"heading","attrs":{"id":"eee703ef-268e-4dde-ba69-8e21d704296a","level":1},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"strong"},{"type":"link","attrs":{"href":"https://wiki.heptabase.com/organize-knowledge-and-projects","edited":false,"title":null,"data-internal-href":null}}],"text":"Organize knowledge & projects"}]},{"type":"image","attrs":{"id":"a2789517-1193-4775-ba2a-18ef32a441be","src":"https://i.imgur.com/z2lOMfm.png","fileId":null,"alt":null,"title":null,"width":null,"originalHeight":2160,"originalWidth":3456,"alignment":"center","reference":null}},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"id":"8cec1cd4-16d1-45d1-bec2-4202a6f1e591","level":2},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Step Overview"}]},{"type":"numbered_list_item","attrs":{"id":"d6d575cb-e96f-4f05-b8ed-e80c8c8e4a61","order":null,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"68048658-ff74-45f2-a17a-1604b57d71df"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Using Heptabase to organize knowledge is best done with the \"two-layer whiteboard structure\":"}]},{"type":"bullet_list_item","attrs":{"id":"a0cd546a-2156-4e3a-9000-824f37e11bd3","folded":false,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"54da3858-8698-47e9-bf91-cdbe0c6b3e88"},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"strong"}],"text":"Parent Whiteboards"},{"type":"text","text":": Projects, Topics, Life, Books, Courses, Thought Leaders, etc."}]}]},{"type":"bullet_list_item","attrs":{"id":"029299d3-ae6a-4bc4-a698-5e60be6c8cfb","folded":false,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"633bfb60-a4c9-43cc-8a98-fc3fc8905289"},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"strong"}],"text":"Sub-Whiteboards"},{"type":"text","text":": Under each parent whiteboard, create separate sub-whiteboards for different projects, research topics, or life areas."}]}]}]},{"type":"numbered_list_item","attrs":{"id":"5dbf3702-ae34-45f9-a945-3df6680f4d2f","order":null,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"2fb9f5ff-0be7-4d64-8e77-cb8f9bbdc66a"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Most notes should be placed in the second-layer sub-whiteboards. If you have fewer than 100 cards on a whiteboard, use the \"Section\" feature ("},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"Cmd/Ctrl + G"},{"type":"text","text":") to organize them. Only consider creating third-layer sub-whiteboards after exceeding 100 notes and fully organizing with sections."}]}]},{"type":"numbered_list_item","attrs":{"id":"949ddf6f-2721-4f11-a482-effdb7185d7e","order":null,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"ce6387aa-cf4b-4bf0-8694-201d08c94edf"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Use whiteboards exclusively for \"knowledge and ideas.\" For content categorized as \"records and reference materials\" (e.g., meeting notes, literature references), consider using the Tag feature."}]}]}]}

cardList.title: Left Sidebar
cardList.content: {"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"heading","attrs":{"id":"8d28a8ad-67ef-442f-bbb7-62648cc37673","level":1},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Left Sidebar"}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"id":"9f16bda1-df4a-4db7-98da-e879431a3c57","level":2},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Top: Apps"}]},{"type":"image","attrs":{"id":"b65d70ec-802d-48be-984e-336d840b3f0a","src":"https://i.imgur.com/tyQN3TO.png","fileId":null,"alt":null,"title":null,"width":null,"originalHeight":584,"originalWidth":506,"alignment":"center","reference":null}},{"type":"bullet_list_item","attrs":{"id":"cfacd564-4f2e-4edb-97be-6fef639899c1","folded":false,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"6ddd05df-4f5b-4d48-b09c-e2b0602b161d"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"You can think of Heptabase as an operating system, and the upper part of its left sidebar displays all the default installed Apps. Each App has a specific purpose, and all Apps share the same card database."}]}]},{"type":"bullet_list_item","attrs":{"id":"f1051263-f0c7-4e52-a42a-b81169acdad8","folded":false,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"4db29a5e-6f0f-42b8-8db4-e77bff4fd895"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Below are the core features of each default App in Heptabase:"}]},{"type":"bullet_list_item","attrs":{"id":"2912b840-36ce-400e-878f-d15058d95a08","folded":false,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"d3f42796-3fce-498c-b481-95ef1c23fe02"},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"strong"}],"text":"Map"},{"type":"text","text":": You can create whiteboards on the map, create sub-whiteboards under the top-level whiteboards, and use these whiteboards to learn and research complex topics by visualizing the knowledge structure of these topics."}]}]},{"type":"bullet_list_item","attrs":{"id":"bab87c17-61e8-4da9-8cf4-01c590aa543b","folded":false,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"c5b9d251-b356-42d6-9654-a1bdf1afbb7e"},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"strong"}],"text":"Card Library"},{"type":"text","text":": You can see all your cards here. When you open a card, you can see on which whiteboards it appears, as well as all the tags and properties it has, in the card info section."}]}]},{"type":"bullet_list_item","attrs":{"id":"0b8c6e29-87ba-44af-8f4c-d5bb7d266818","folded":false,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"379dacfb-c4dd-4f6a-8059-11d02b939b5c"},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"strong"}],"text":"Tag"},{"type":"text","text":": You can see all the tags you have here and organize these tags into different groups."}]}]},{"type":"bullet_list_item","attrs":{"id":"6fbee43d-c52f-4b13-8ce2-5df0f6a7cee7","folded":false,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"46f3c8ce-ccff-4d8d-9753-a4b3afa8232a"},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"strong"}],"text":"Journal"},{"type":"text","text":": You can see all your diary cards here, quickly record thoughts and to-do items in the daily diary."}]}]},{"type":"bullet_list_item","attrs":{"id":"2b55a609-6e45-486a-86c7-01b25ef54b19","folded":false,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"7c6bc2e3-a8a4-49fb-92ec-074b9a89f66d"},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"strong"}],"text":"Task"},{"type":"text","text":": You can see all the incomplete to-dos in all the cards here. If you don't have any incomplete to-dos, this app will not appear."}]}]},{"type":"bullet_list_item","attrs":{"id":"d198d63d-2e42-435b-ac91-feb6f8e3d3de","folded":false,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"780ce134-1b87-4254-b5aa-6da6ee180fc6"},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"strong"}],"text":"Highlight"},{"type":"text","text":": You can see all the highlights you've created on PDF cards or imported from Readwise here. If you don't have any highlights, this app will not appear."}]}]}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"id":"9292bebd-e3d5-491d-b4a8-5d924a50763a","level":2},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Bottom: Tabs"}]},{"type":"bullet_list_item","attrs":{"id":"32f27a2d-34dc-42df-a3b3-0b3d66c4eee6","folded":false,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"107a88b5-32eb-43c7-a2b5-76863f271dba"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"The lower half of the Heptabase left sidebar is the \"Tab System\". When you expand a card from the card library, the card will open as a card tab. Similarly, when you open a whiteboard or a tag, they will each open as new tabs."}]},{"type":"image","attrs":{"id":"c59658ce-9df9-4609-9414-0add2b1d8892","src":"https://i.imgur.com/NAzUvlc.png","fileId":null,"alt":null,"title":null,"width":null,"originalHeight":1672,"originalWidth":998,"alignment":"center","reference":null}}]},{"type":"bullet_list_item","attrs":{"id":"0ec25ea8-4007-47be-a4ab-4fae88e6cff6","folded":false,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"35d4a805-19a3-4cb1-8acb-a86509e26e63"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"The design of the Heptabase tab system is very similar to traditional browsers, including the following types of tabs:"}]},{"type":"bullet_list_item","attrs":{"id":"4c6eb0d5-1879-4b21-8b0e-f98b7b98aa17","folded":false,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"bd089ad8-8716-4cf4-aa39-24c24264a649"},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"strong"}],"text":"Normal Tab"},{"type":"text","text":": When you open a card, a whiteboard, or a tag, it will open into a normal tab, and you can close it at any time by clicking on the cross button."}]}]},{"type":"bullet_list_item","attrs":{"id":"18deb12d-2324-4f7d-abc8-bb44afeccc1a","folded":false,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"c10be6ed-18cb-4295-988b-595d177528bd"},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"strong"}],"text":"Pinned Tab"},{"type":"text","text":": You can pin frequently opened tabs, keeping them always open at the top of the left sidebar."}]},{"type":"image","attrs":{"id":"f829174c-17cc-4dc4-8895-6123f47ad422","src":"https://i.imgur.com/2wd3ydj.png","fileId":null,"alt":null,"title":null,"width":null,"originalHeight":258,"originalWidth":870,"alignment":"center","reference":null}}]},{"type":"bullet_list_item","attrs":{"id":"a78e4b2c-67e1-435a-a580-c413251e8dd7","folded":false,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"3858d511-f3ff-45e8-a9e4-dcaeedab2cf4"},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"strong"}],"text":"Tab Folder"},{"type":"text","text":": When you have many pinned tabs at the top of the left sidebar, you might consider adding a tab folder to organize these pinned tabs."}]},{"type":"image","attrs":{"id":"fd44967b-782e-448f-b743-cc23ad79162b","src":"https://i.imgur.com/OfX2koW.png","fileId":null,"alt":null,"title":null,"width":null,"originalHeight":588,"originalWidth":850,"alignment":"center","reference":null}}]},{"type":"bullet_list_item","attrs":{"id":"1e94a39a-cb7f-4f05-a587-af9494468f91","folded":false,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"9e94b1db-815d-4b63-bc08-f1f60b9b4ae8"},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"strong"}],"text":"Tab Group"},{"type":"text","text":": You may consider creating tab groups to separate different use case. For example, you can create a tab group for \"Work\" and \"Life\", and when you need to access notes related to life, you go to the \"Life\" tab group and view all the normal tabs, pinned tabs, and tab folders in this group."}]},{"type":"image","attrs":{"id":"3df6d0d5-99d3-4987-9abb-faf52fc47687","src":"https://i.imgur.com/6P2OPjL.png","fileId":null,"alt":null,"title":null,"width":null,"originalHeight":712,"originalWidth":996,"alignment":"center","reference":null}}]}]}]}

cardList.title: Algemene voorwaarden
cardList.content: {"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"heading","attrs":{"id":"33913606-07a0-42f1-a5e2-606d52d97d51","level":1},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Algemene voorwaarden"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"26d38ba8-839b-4314-be65-1c2aba9c9de9"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":" Deze website wordt beheerd door Ekaaza. Op de hele site verwijzen de termen “wij”, “ons”, “onze” en “ondernemer” naar Ekaaza. Ekaaza biedt deze website, inclusief alle informatie, hulpmiddelen en diensten die op deze site beschikbaar zijn, aan u, de gebruiker, aan op voorwaarde dat u akkoord gaat met alle hier vermelde voorwaarden, beleid en mededelingen."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"f44954e1-b18c-4254-b0e0-2440fbe6107e"},"content":[{"type":"hard_break"},{"type":"text","text":"Door onze site te bezoeken en/of iets bij ons te kopen, gaat u akkoord met onze “Service” en gaat u ermee akkoord gebonden te zijn aan de volgende algemene voorwaarden (“Servicevoorwaarden”, “Voorwaarden”), inclusief die aanvullende algemene voorwaarden en beleid waarnaar hierin wordt verwezen en/of beschikbaar is via een hyperlink. Deze Servicevoorwaarden zijn van toepassing op alle gebruikers van de site, inclusief maar niet beperkt tot gebruikers die browsers, leveranciers, klanten, verkopers en/of bijdragers aan de inhoud zijn."},{"type":"hard_break"},{"type":"hard_break"},{"type":"text","text":"Lees deze Servicevoorwaarden zorgvuldig door voordat u onze website bezoekt of gebruikt. Door enig deel van de site te bezoeken of te gebruiken, gaat u ermee akkoord gebonden te zijn aan deze Servicevoorwaarden. Als u niet akkoord gaat met alle voorwaarden van deze overeenkomst, heeft u geen toegang tot de website en kunt u geen diensten gebruiken. Indien deze Servicevoorwaarden als een aanbod worden beschouwd, is de aanvaarding uitdrukkelijk beperkt tot deze Servicevoorwaarden."},{"type":"hard_break"},{"type":"hard_break"},{"type":"text","text":"Alle nieuwe functies of tools die aan de huidige winkel worden toegevoegd, zijn ook onderworpen aan de Servicevoorwaarden. U kunt de meest recente versie van de Servicevoorwaarden op elk gewenst moment op deze pagina bekijken. Wij behouden ons het recht voor om enig onderdeel van deze Servicevoorwaarden bij te werken, te wijzigen of te vervangen door updates en/of wijzigingen op onze website te plaatsen. Het is uw verantwoordelijkheid om deze pagina regelmatig te controleren op wijzigingen. Uw voortgezette gebruik van of toegang tot de website na het plaatsen van eventuele wijzigingen houdt aanvaarding van die wijzigingen in."},{"type":"hard_break"},{"type":"hard_break"},{"type":"text","text":"Onze winkel wordt gehost op Shopify Inc. Zij bieden ons het online e-commerceplatform waarmee we onze producten en diensten aan u kunnen verkopen."},{"type":"hard_break"},{"type":"hard_break"},{"type":"text","text":"Door akkoord te gaan met deze Servicevoorwaarden, verklaart u dat u ten minste meerderjarig bent in de staat of provincie waar u woont, of dat u meerderjarig bent in de staat of provincie waar u woont en dat u ons uw toestemming hebt gegeven om sta al uw minderjarige gezinsleden toe om deze site te gebruiken."},{"type":"hard_break"},{"type":"text","text":"U mag onze producten niet gebruiken voor illegale of ongeoorloofde doeleinden, noch mag u bij het gebruik van de Service wetten in uw rechtsgebied overtreden (inclusief maar niet beperkt tot auteursrechtwetten)."},{"type":"hard_break"},{"type":"text","text":"U mag geen wormen of virussen of enige code van destructieve aard verzenden."},{"type":"hard_break"},{"type":"text","text":"Een schending of schending van een van de Voorwaarden zal resulteren in een onmiddellijke beëindiging van uw Services."},{"type":"hard_break"},{"type":"hard_break"},{"type":"text","text":"We behouden ons het recht voor om op elk moment om welke reden dan ook service aan iemand te weigeren."},{"type":"hard_break"},{"type":"text","text":"U begrijpt dat uw inhoud (exclusief creditcardgegevens) ongecodeerd kan worden overgedragen en (a) overdrachten via verschillende netwerken kan omvatten; en (b) wijzigingen om te voldoen aan en aan te passen aan de technische vereisten van het verbinden van netwerken of apparaten. Creditcardgegevens worden altijd gecodeerd tijdens overdracht via netwerken."},{"type":"hard_break"},{"type":"text","text":"U stemt ermee in om geen enkel deel van de Dienst, het gebruik van de Dienst, of toegang tot de Dienst of enig contact op de website via welke de dienst wordt aangeboden, te reproduceren, dupliceren, kopiëren, verkopen, doorverkopen of exploiteren, zonder uitdrukkelijke schriftelijke toestemming van ons ."},{"type":"hard_break"},{"type":"text","text":"De kopjes die in deze overeenkomst worden gebruikt, zijn uitsluitend voor het gemak opgenomen en zullen deze Voorwaarden niet beperken of anderszins beïnvloeden."}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"id":"6aaa17de-b649-4349-8aca-944172d90657","level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Artikel 1 - Definities"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"a180e8b0-1dd1-47b4-a73a-35b714ea6b04"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"In deze voorwaarden wordt verstaan onder:"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"e9f99cb0-e1e8-4624-9e63-21b26042d0f0"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Bedenktijd: de termijn waarbinnen de consument gebruik kan maken van zijn herroepingsrecht;"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"cdea1007-1e50-495f-b642-ad699fcb1245"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Consument: de natuurlijke persoon die niet handelt in de uitoefening van beroep of bedrijf en een overeenkomst op afstand aangaat met de ondernemer;"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"be24cb2e-05d6-4e8c-bdef-a08b6cedca6a"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Dag: 23 januari 2022"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"2a95a066-f66d-41a2-b548-7821846748a2"},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"strong"}],"text":"Duurtransactie"},{"type":"text","text":": een overeenkomst op afstand met betrekking tot een reeks van producten en/of diensten, waarvan de leverings- en/of afnameverplichting in de tijd is gespreid;"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"86fbcaf0-f6da-4c52-9f65-9f3e26c35aca"},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"strong"}],"text":"Duurzame gegevensdrager"},{"type":"text","text":": elk middel dat de consument of ondernemer in staat stelt om informatie die aan hem persoonlijk is gericht, op te slaan op een manier die toekomstige raadpleging en ongewijzigde reproductie van de opgeslagen informatie mogelijk maakt."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"ca682905-b15c-4f08-8348-dbf7fb459451"},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"strong"}],"text":"Herroepingsrecht"},{"type":"text","text":": de mogelijkheid voor de consument om binnen de bedenktijd af te zien van de overeenkomst op afstand;"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"95dfa162-b938-43fa-a1c0-16f1866db527"},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"strong"}],"text":"Ondernemer"},{"type":"text","text":": de natuurlijke of rechtspersoon die producten en/of diensten op afstand aan consumenten aanbiedt;"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"9756ee38-e0f9-4d96-9d22-737270840cae"},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"strong"}],"text":"Overeenkomst op afstand"},{"type":"text","text":": een overeenkomst waarbij in het kader van een door de ondernemer georganiseerd systeem voor verkoop op afstand van producten en/of diensten, tot en met het sluiten van de overeenkomst uitsluitend gebruik gemaakt wordt van één of meer technieken voor communicatie op afstand;"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"ae2e90f9-4be8-4a2c-9a5b-989d7cfbd8ed"},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"strong"}],"text":"Techniek voor communicatie op afstand"},{"type":"text","text":": middel dat kan worden gebruikt voor het sluiten van een overeenkomst, zonder dat consument en ondernemer gelijktijdig in dezelfde ruimte zijn samengekomen."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"24fb05b9-3d8f-43a7-aceb-dfc6ad05c133"},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"strong"}],"text":"Algemene Voorwaarden"},{"type":"text","text":": de onderhavige Algemene Voorwaarden van de ondernemer."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"5a0d045c-97b3-45f9-858a-78e57c91164a"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"ARTIKEL 2 - IDENTITEIT VAN DE ONDERNEMER"}]},{"type":"bullet_list_item","attrs":{"id":"4c73e4d9-eea9-47d8-9b85-7b236db36c27","folded":false,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"660aee95-cdbe-4d4b-8668-ff4e17b3f444"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Handelsnaam: Ekaaza"}]}]},{"type":"bullet_list_item","attrs":{"id":"5af9c29a-c41d-455a-a6d5-08dce1fd4e3f","folded":false,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"3a21c665-ce63-4ccf-8240-5657c57be758"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"E-mailadres: Nummer: NL003308879B35"}]}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"id":"22862a19-ff3e-4aee-9911-5da115d31f33","level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Artikel 3 - TOEPASSELIJKHEID"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"d8136aba-61cb-4905-9576-a838c42b9f02"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Deze algemene voorwaarden zijn van toepassing op elk aanbod van de ondernemer en op elke tot stand gekomen overeenkomst op afstand en bestellingen tussen ondernemer en consument."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"4722d513-a043-4c91-9de9-c9dd70d65120"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Voordat de overeenkomst op afstand wordt gesloten, wordt de tekst van deze algemene voorwaarden aan de consument beschikbaar gesteld. Indien dit redelijkerwijs niet mogelijk is, zal voordat de overeenkomst op afstand wordt gesloten, worden aangegeven dat de algemene voorwaarden bij de ondernemer zijn in te zien en zij op verzoek van de consument zo spoedig mogelijk kosteloos worden toegezonden."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"b66a7172-8a63-4558-8b6a-4c8b5df0d994"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Indien de overeenkomst op afstand elektronisch wordt gesloten, kan in afwijking van het vorige lid en voordat de overeenkomst op afstand wordt gesloten, de tekst van deze algemene voorwaarden langs elektronische weg aan de consument ter beschikking worden gesteld op zodanige wijze dat deze door de consument op een eenvoudige manier kan worden opgeslagen op een duurzame gegevensdrager. Indien dit redelijkerwijs niet mogelijk is, zal voordat de overeenkomst op afstand wordt gesloten, worden aangegeven waar van de algemene voorwaarden langs elektronische weg kan worden kennisgenomen en dat zij op verzoek van de consument langs elektronische weg of op andere wijze kosteloos zullen worden toegezonden."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"1ef4e9e6-b806-4d18-9e44-b2c6f522fc73"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Voor het geval dat naast deze algemene voorwaarden tevens specifieke product- of dienstenvoorwaarden van toepassing zijn, is het tweede en derde lid van overeenkomstige toepassing en kan de consument zich in geval van tegenstrijdige algemene voorwaarden steeds beroepen op de toepasselijke bepaling die voor hem het meest gunstig is."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"3728a662-8915-4f36-a00b-07c8cbaa5672"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Indien één of meerdere bepalingen in deze algemene voorwaarden op enig moment geheel of gedeeltelijk nietig zijn of vernietigd worden, dan blijft de overeenkomst en deze voorwaarden voor het overige in stand en zal de betreffende bepaling in onderling overleg onverwijld vervangen worden door een bepaling dat de strekking van het oorspronkelijke zoveel mogelijk benaderd."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"f2d42644-28b7-480d-b660-bf9da797c9ae"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Situaties die niet in deze algemene voorwaarden zijn geregeld, dienen te worden beoordeeld 'naar de geest' van deze algemene voorwaarden."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"27a43c62-f436-4426-a99d-b7a43867bbec"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Onduidelijkheden over de uitleg of inhoud van één of meerdere bepalingen van onze voorwaarden, dienen uitgelegd te worden 'naar de geest' van deze algemene voorwaarden."}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"id":"6af5e3d6-f3f0-4de4-b62a-5730551332b4","level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Artikel 4 - Het Aanbod"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"7b8b32ed-43d5-4c7a-830c-c93e5df20260"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Indien een aanbod een beperkte geldigheidsduur heeft of onder voorwaarden geschiedt, wordt dit nadrukkelijk in het aanbod vermeld."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"ee35ba44-4bcf-41fd-9c26-8d104615f45e"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Het aanbod is vrijblijvend. De ondernemer is gerechtigd het aanbod te wijzigen en aan te passen."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"ba60d37d-f94e-4369-8369-b3f9779cbc49"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Het aanbod bevat een volledige en nauwkeurige omschrijving van de aangeboden producten en/of diensten. De beschrijving is voldoende gedetailleerd om een goede beoordeling van het aanbod door de consument mogelijk te maken. Als de ondernemer gebruik maakt van afbeeldingen zijn deze een waarheidsgetrouwe weergave van de aangeboden producten en/of diensten. Kennelijke vergissingen of kennelijke fouten in het aanbod binden de ondernemer niet."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"9d106646-8232-42da-abbf-573aeab86a3c"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Alle afbeeldingen, specificaties gegevens in het aanbod zijn indicatie en kunnen geen aanleiding zijn tot schadevergoeding of ontbinding van de overeenkomst."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"cfeeb607-d2e8-49d0-97af-fee1e6188c28"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Afbeeldingen bij producten zijn een waarheidsgetrouwe weergave van de aangeboden producten. Ondernemer kan niet garanderen dat de weergegeven kleuren exact overeenkomen met de echte kleuren van de producten."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"b5aed771-35bf-486b-a9a5-a5db31b43778"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Elk aanbod bevat zodanige informatie, dat voor de consument duidelijk is wat de rechten en verplichtingen zijn, die aan de aanvaarding van het aanbod zijn verbonden. Dit betreft in het bijzonder:"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"63ca157e-b8b0-4502-90af-e909c8cdfd15"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"de prijs, met uitzondering van inklaringskosten en invoer btw. Deze additionele kosten zullen voor rekening en risico van de klant zijn. De post en/of koeriersdienst zal met betrekking tot de invoer gebruikmaken van de bijzondere regeling voor post- en koeriersdiensten. Deze regeling geldt als de goederen worden ingevoerd in het EU-land van bestemming, wat in het onderhavige ook het geval is. De post- en of koeriersdienst int de btw (al dan niet tezamen met de in rekening gebrachte inklaringskosten) bij de ontvanger van de goederen;"}]},{"type":"bullet_list_item","attrs":{"id":"aafeac3f-acc7-46c9-b470-d21de26b33dd","folded":false,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"2d3ad682-d84c-4c76-a9dc-8fd2ba2f3540"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"de
