herroepingsrecht;"}]}]},{"type":"numbered_list_item","attrs":{"id":"00bae93f-cbb6-4d81-81a8-b51fe3ac876f","order":null,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"6c06943b-b6fe-411b-a3ae-8435a232d6c0"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"de informatie over garanties en bestaande service na aankoop;"}]}]},{"type":"numbered_list_item","attrs":{"id":"8b9219ce-29c3-4ab5-9e31-60f614949e82","order":null,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"2aa51bec-a6e7-4bd7-91b8-3418d6962143"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"de in artikel 4 lid 3 van deze voorwaarden opgenomen gegevens, tenzij de ondernemer deze gegevens al aan de consument heeft verstrekt vóór de uitvoering van de overeenkomst;"}]}]},{"type":"numbered_list_item","attrs":{"id":"05140c8c-8a0e-4bf2-8185-ecd20c6c7d35","order":null,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"1bbaccd5-3ebc-4d06-931e-ff5c76abacc8"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"de vereisten voor opzegging van de overeenkomst indien de overeenkomst een duur heeft van meer dan één jaar of van onbepaalde duur is."}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"bd06abde-f5b8-456d-8b81-99ab68d1b107"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"In geval van een duurtransactie is de bepaling in het vorige lid slechts van toepassing op de eerste levering."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"f2ba3036-f3e7-43ed-b16b-6a7aebc41585"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"ledere overeenkomst wordt aangegaan onder de opschortende voorwaarden van voldoende beschikbaarheid van de betreffende producten."}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"id":"8118250e-493e-4303-b9d3-c3e36ae61a7c","level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Artikel 6 – Herroepingsrecht"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"cd589d8b-4686-4025-835f-5be0b8c5a843"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Bij de aankoop van producten heeft de consument de mogelijkheid de overeenkomst zonder opgave van redenen te ontbinden gedurende 14 dagen. Deze bedenktermijn gaat in op de dag na ontvangst van het product door de consument of een vooraf door de consument aangewezen en aan de ondernemer bekend gemaakte vertegenwoordiger."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"7417d540-8e8c-41e6-8d7d-2a172c33798e"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Tijdens de bedenktijd zal de consument zorgvuldig omgaan met het product en de verpakking. Hij zal het product slechts in die mate uitpakken of gebruiken voor zover dat nodig is om te kunnen beoordelen of hij het product wenst te behouden. Indien hij van zijn herroepingsrecht gebruik maakt, zal hij het product met alle geleverde toebehoren en – indien redelijkerwijze mogelijk – in de originele staat en verpakking aan de ondernemer retourneren, conform de door de ondernemer verstrekte redelijke en duidelijke instructies."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"0f2ddcad-aa36-424f-b6ab-a2270f746a29"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Wanneer de consument gebruik wenst te maken van zijn herroepingsrecht is hij verplicht dit binnen 14 dagen, na ontvangst van het product, kenbaar te maken aan de ondernemer. Het kenbaar maken dient de consument te doen middels een geschreven bericht/e-mail. Nadat de consument kenbaar heeft gemaakt gebruik te willen maken van zijn herroepingsrecht dient de klant het product binnen 14 dagen retour te sturen. De consument dient te bewijzen dat de geleverde zaken tijdig zijn teruggestuurd, bijvoorbeeld door middel van een bewijs van verzending."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"1e471135-5c09-4dc6-ba9b-7f3de884891b"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Indien de klant na afloop van de in lid 2 en 3 genoemde termijnen niet kenbaar heeft gemaakt gebruik te willen maken van zijn herroepingsrecht resp. het product niet aan de ondernemer heeft teruggezonden, is de koop een feit."}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"id":"287fdec1-7b18-42a1-b25c-3077a759350f","level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Artikel 7 - Kosten in geval van herroeping"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"02ecd873-dc93-482d-9df7-d89dea3524a7"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Indien de consument gebruik maakt van zijn herroepingsrecht, zijn de kosten voor het retourneren van de producten voor de rekening van de consument."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"92452224-b03d-40ba-8725-78e1170c4839"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Indien de consument een bedrag betaald heeft, zal de ondernemer dit bedrag zo spoedig mogelijk, doch uiterlijk binnen 14 dagen na herroeping, terugbetalen. Hierbij is wel de voorwaarde dat het product reeds terugontvangen is door de webwinkelier of sluitend bewijs van complete terugzending overlegd kan worden."}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"id":"f2ac5ad5-8163-4846-85cb-b1f87fa83c31","level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Artikel 8 - Uitsluiting herroepingsrecht"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"0ae90c12-96da-4d33-adee-e259920f0694"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"De ondernemer kan het herroepingsrecht van de consument uitsluiten voor producten zoals omschreven in lid 2 en 3. De uitsluiting van het herroepingsrecht geldt slechts indien de ondernemer dit duidelijk in het aanbod, althans tijdig voor het sluiten van de overeenkomst, heeft vermeld."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"f6965b24-0f6c-475d-b0e4-2eb2b36df5fe"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Uitsluiting van het herroepingsrecht is slechts mogelijk voor producten:"}]},{"type":"numbered_list_item","attrs":{"id":"7af66855-aa6e-462d-8ad8-30a3ca4958e9","order":null,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"8dfcfedc-b416-4a21-abc0-962371c0c705"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"die door de ondernemer tot stand zijn gebracht overeenkomstig specificaties van de consument;"}]}]},{"type":"numbered_list_item","attrs":{"id":"3f6d3875-7605-4d0d-8f02-224b9839239c","order":null,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"be0b1c56-9396-4002-9431-dc0855cfe538"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"die duidelijk persoonlijk van aard zijn;"}]}]},{"type":"numbered_list_item","attrs":{"id":"dc2dedde-e032-4392-83de-4df91bbabff3","order":null,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"38431ae0-acde-41c4-a837-608a0da41447"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"die door hun aard niet kunnen worden teruggezonden;"}]}]},{"type":"numbered_list_item","attrs":{"id":"fa3b42b4-3c42-4307-96c3-fb930c3a47ea","order":null,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"0acfc4c6-bd8d-46f7-8907-ef681f660d48"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"die snel kunnen bederven of verouderen;"}]}]},{"type":"numbered_list_item","attrs":{"id":"b33bb09b-af68-4e3e-9d12-9bd3ddb8e5c5","order":null,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"0f0e0fd9-a8c1-475a-90dd-9a7f50afb2fd"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"waarvan de prijs gebonden is aan schommelingen op de financiële markt waarop de ondernemer geen invloed heeft;"}]}]},{"type":"numbered_list_item","attrs":{"id":"c4d33844-a3b1-4d7f-8e44-7a157e44af11","order":null,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"e02c8d05-9227-4299-976f-75859f4ceba6"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"voor losse kranten en tijdschriften;"}]}]},{"type":"numbered_list_item","attrs":{"id":"2420277a-b59f-43be-b6cb-3ac0fa58b63d","order":null,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"98916840-e05d-43b7-85b1-b3be9b60d571"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"voor audio- en video-opnamen en computersoftware waarvan de consument de verzegeling heeft verbroken."}]}]},{"type":"numbered_list_item","attrs":{"id":"182162a2-bf7a-4a0f-96f5-a1781459f58a","order":null,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"d903a651-ec35-474f-9bb4-fc5fddb4a265"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"voor hygiënische producten waarvan de consument de verzegeling heeft verbroken."}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"ecd9a575-129c-46fa-931b-3e94a916e85b"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Uitsluiting van het herroepingsrecht is slechts mogelijk voor diensten:"}]},{"type":"numbered_list_item","attrs":{"id":"5cd053ac-4b98-4972-84ea-ca409b872be2","order":null,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"d87e1dd6-b54a-47b7-b041-bd6cc35d8432"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"betreffende logies, vervoer, restaurantbedrijf of vrijetijdsbesteding te verrichten op een bepaalde datum of tijdens een bepaalde periode;"}]}]},{"type":"numbered_list_item","attrs":{"id":"939793fc-d3a7-4b65-8e14-8187a5fd8312","order":null,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"166340bc-4c6d-430b-87b6-62d0922a4f00"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"waarvan de levering met uitdrukkelijke instemming van de consument is begonnen voordat de bedenktijd is verstreken;"}]}]},{"type":"numbered_list_item","attrs":{"id":"5f3d9a9f-e4e1-4c91-a6bb-5aa9f63525e9","order":null,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"26d9e4bf-1e96-4094-a83d-ac9bbbe57b4f"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"betreffende weddenschappen en loterijen."}]}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"id":"b11e5f5d-a990-4e8e-b751-bf1814930385","level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Artikel 9 - De Prijs"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"0bbd8bd1-618c-4a25-8462-5386471c4830"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Ik behoud mij het recht voor om gedurende de in het aanbod vermelde geldigheidsduur de prijzen van de aangeboden producten en/of diensten te wijzigen, ook als gevolg van veranderingen in BTW-tarieven."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"25a932bd-2dc4-4ee0-95b8-f8e2dd49829c"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"In afwijking van het vorige lid kan de ondernemer producten of diensten waarvan de prijzen gebonden zijn aan schommelingen op de financiële markt en waar de ondernemer geen invloed op heeft, met variabele prijzen aanbieden. Deze gebondenheid aan schommelingen en het feit dat eventueel vermelde prijzen richtprijzen zijn, worden bij het aanbod vermeld."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"dd767ac8-52d0-41a1-af37-fa2281197043"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Prijsverhogingen binnen 3 maanden na de totstandkoming van de overeenkomst zijn alleen toegestaan indien zij het gevolg zijn van wettelijke regelingen of bepalingen."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"f1a9fee0-b36b-45cd-8349-4691b4ea6c9e"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Prijsverhogingen vanaf 3 maanden na de totstandkoming van de overeenkomst zijn alleen toegestaan indien de ondernemer dit bedongen heeft en:"}]},{"type":"numbered_list_item","attrs":{"id":"d39a98f6-3150-4844-bee3-208bac8999c3","order":null,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"2458e054-fc33-48af-b79c-c66004716385"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"deze het gevolg zijn van wettelijke regelingen of bepalingen; of"}]}]},{"type":"numbered_list_item","attrs":{"id":"fce9d417-f4a4-4456-b9b5-83c268607c40","order":null,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"d44ea83e-43e6-4888-a374-67e18e1f5999"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"de consument de bevoegdheid heeft de overeenkomst op te zeggen met ingang van de dag waarop de prijsverhoging ingaat."}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"718913b7-5517-4fc7-85c3-13b7abd4e7a3"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"De plaats van levering vindt op grond van artikel 5, eerste lid, Wet op de omzetbelasting 1968 plaats in het land waar het vervoer aanvangt. In het onderhavige vindt deze levering plaats buiten EU. In navolging hiervan zal er door de post- of koerierdienst bij de afnemer invoer btw c.q. inklaringskosten worden geint. Derhalve zal er door de ondernemer geen btw in rekening worden gebracht."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"2308617c-a702-4bfb-892a-ffed85e588d4"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Alle prijzen zijn onder voorbehoud van druk - en zetfouten. Voor de gevolgen van druk- en zetfouten wordt geen aansprakelijkheid aanvaard. Bij druk- en zetfouten is de ondernemer niet verplicht het product volgens de foutieve prijs te leveren."}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"id":"35bbb544-74f6-462f-8e0e-5be627c35221","level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Artikel 10 - Conformiteit en garantie"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"5826f011-5ff1-4f77-bbe8-cab19c94b1dc"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"De ondernemer staat ervoor in dat de producten en/of diensten voldoen aan de overeenkomst, de in het aanbod vermelde specificaties, aan de redelijke eisen van deugdelijkheid en/of bruikbaarheid en de op de datum van de totstandkoming van de overeenkomst bestaande wettelijke bepalingen en/of overheidsvoorschriften. Indien overeengekomen staat de ondernemer er tevens voor in dat het product geschikt is voor ander dan normaal gebruik."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"e1a41b41-1f62-40d7-af0a-00578b3176de"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Een door de ondernemer, fabrikant of importeur verstrekte garantie doet niets af aan de wettelijke rechten en vorderingen die de consument op grond van de overeenkomst tegenover de ondernemer kan doen gelden."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"8b4cefcd-284a-475c-aacd-883d0f19935a"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Eventuele gebreken of verkeerd geleverde producten dienen binnen 14 dagen na levering aan de ondernemer schriftelijk te worden gemeld. Terugzending van de producten dient te geschieden in de originele verpakking en in nieuwstaat verkerend."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"9963d64f-d65d-4083-bf2f-3164978903d5"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"De garantietermijn van de ondernemer komt overeen met de fabrieksgarantietermijn. De ondernemer is echter te nimmer verantwoordelijk voor de uiteindelijke geschiktheid van de producten voor elke individuele toepassing door de consument, noch voor eventuele adviezen ten aanzien van het gebruik of de toepassing van de producten."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"2f46d9d9-d76a-40b6-98cb-9963257c1a5a"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"De garantie geldt niet indien:"}]},{"type":"bullet_list_item","attrs":{"id":"dd3a0ff7-a6a8-4895-aced-0c14591b1b7b","folded":false,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"5f0e1b11-845c-4f77-8d99-b74719ed81d0"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"de consument de geleverde producten zelf heeft gerepareerd en/of bewerkt of door derden heeft laten repareren en/of bewerken;"}]}]},{"type":"bullet_list_item","attrs":{"id":"7ddb5628-0651-4307-8b3c-e7da99614b26","folded":false,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"d7ac49cc-5e60-4907-97fa-867f60197750"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"de geleverde producten aan abnormale omstandigheden zijn blootgesteld of anderszins onzorgvuldig worden behandeld of in strijd zijn met de aanwijzingen van de ondernemer en/of op de verpakking behandeld zijn;"}]}]},{"type":"bullet_list_item","attrs":{"id":"976d5850-9bb6-4bf0-87b7-4639fce25693","folded":false,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"8723f51f-bedb-4bc5-b8b0-dd8a87e6e2fb"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"de ondeugdelijkheid geheel of gedeeltelijk het gevolg is van voorschriften die de overheid heeft gesteld of zal stellen ten aanzien van de aard of de kwaliteit van de toegepaste materialen."}]}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"id":"2843538d-6f52-4da8-ac3b-6728242f8435","level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Artikel 11 - Persoonlijke informatie"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"9d749c69-458e-4499-a3df-7c9ba2b21379"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Op uw indiening van persoonlijke gegevens via de winkel is ons Privacybeleid van toepassing. Om ons privacybeleid te bekijken."}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"id":"699c8c59-3bff-4295-b8cb-1182cee4a6d8","level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Artikel 12 - Fouten, onnauwkeurigheden en omissies"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"ec5bcc9e-0062-4ebe-8725-011b803989a5"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Af en toe kan er informatie op onze site of in de Dienst staan die typografische fouten, onnauwkeurigheden of weglatingen bevat die betrekking kunnen hebben op productbeschrijvingen, prijzen, promoties, aanbiedingen, verzendkosten van producten, transittijden en beschikbaarheid. We behouden ons het recht voor om eventuele fouten, onnauwkeurigheden of weglatingen te corrigeren en om informatie te wijzigen of bij te werken of bestellingen te annuleren als informatie in de Service of op een gerelateerde website op enig moment en zonder voorafgaande kennisgeving onjuist is (ook nadat u uw bestelling hebt geplaatst). ."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"d1b93efa-469c-4f4f-842c-97ac25f1f9e2"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Wij zijn niet verplicht om informatie in de Service of op een gerelateerde website bij te werken, te wijzigen of te verduidelijken, inclusief maar niet beperkt tot prijsinformatie, behalve zoals vereist door de wet. Er mag geen gespecificeerde update- of vernieuwingsdatum worden toegepast in de Service of op een gerelateerde website, om aan te geven dat alle informatie in de Service of op een gerelateerde website is gewijzigd of bijgewerkt."}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"id":"2a5324d9-db28-48b4-ada1-958c83b31b43","level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Artikel 13 - Wijzigingen in de servicevoorwaarden"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"ccbfd9b5-ae87-4a4b-8500-406395bcc245"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"U kunt de meest recente versie van de Servicevoorwaarden op elk gewenst moment op deze pagina bekijken."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"8850d9e2-be21-4162-ab47-9997ce3641fb"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Wij behouden ons het recht voor om, naar eigen goeddunken, enig onderdeel van deze Servicevoorwaarden bij te werken, te wijzigen of te vervangen door updates en wijzigingen op onze website te plaatsen. Het is uw verantwoordelijkheid om onze website regelmatig te controleren op wijzigingen. Uw voortgezette gebruik van of toegang tot onze website of de Dienst na het plaatsen van eventuele wijzigingen in deze Servicevoorwaarden houdt aanvaarding van die wijzigingen in."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"7e80f3a3-73b1-4042-97ab-3a747e77382c"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":" "}]}]}

cardList.title: Collection Page
cardList.content:
{"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"heading","attrs":{"id":"b7846924-9a0a-483d-a32b-72be8068a259","level":1},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Collection Page"}]},{"type":"code_block","attrs":{"id":"0871f3ae-6b28-4af7-8e67-ce6ea8f7bf87","params":"plain"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Schrijf een wervende introductietekst voor een collectiepagina.  

Eisen:  
- Lengte: 2–4 zinnen.  
- Noem de collectie expliciet: [VUL HIER DE COLLECTIENAAM IN].  
- Leg kort uit wat de klant in deze collectie vindt (stijl, comfort, functionaliteit, sfeer, gemak, enz.).  
- Schrijf klantgericht: benadruk wat het de klant oplevert.  
- Houd de toon inspirerend en toegankelijk.  

Geef de output in exact dit format:  

[INTRODUCTIE TEKST]  
...  
"}]},{"type":"code_block","attrs":{"id":"3c3fc327-f875-4e3c-ac71-5d83a70cec0a","params":"plain"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Schrijf een SEO-vriendelijke meta title en meta description voor de volgende collectie/pagina:  
**[VUL HIER DE COLLECTIENAAM OF PAGINA IN]**  

Eisen:  
- [META TITLE]: maximaal 70 tekens. Formaat: *[Collectienaam] | [USP of kernwoord]*.  
- [META DESCRIPTION]: maximaal 160 tekens. Beschrijvend, klantgericht en eindig met een duidelijke call-to-action (bijv. "Shop nu online!" of "Bestel direct!").  
- Gebruik klantgerichte taal (comfort, sfeer, gemak, stijl).  
- Schrijf altijd actief en uitnodigend.  

Geef de output in exact dit format:  

[META TITLE]  
...  

[META DESCRIPTION]  
...  
"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"d254c199-203e-41f3-ba52-fc16a676b013"}},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"11cf24b2-f40d-4aeb-a6c9-4328856edfce"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"[META TITLE]"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"14fd23eb-b1ae-4664-93be-6761ce565a95"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"[META DESCRIPTION]"}]}]}

cardList.title: 💭 HOOKS GENERATOR-prompt
cardList.content:
{"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"heading","attrs":{"id":"e9f67cd1-06d2-4963-940a-631509c0aa50","level":1},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"💭 HOOKS GENERATOR-prompt"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"f271114f-890d-474e-8721-b4624835785e"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"INPUT:"}]},{"type":"bullet_list_item","attrs":{"id":"bdf57446-a171-4dcf-920d-44e9af77db7b","folded":false,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"ac699aec-6572-4724-b807-253658d4aafa"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"one angle"}]}]},{"type":"bullet_list_item","attrs":{"id":"3b9e79e2-d12b-4470-8f4a-e34c510642c4","folded":false,"format":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"b46ee08f-75da-4d05-b4b5-e924e8ccbaf5"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"product data extraction"}]}]},{"type":"code_block","attrs":{"id":"b1c020fe-e72f-4059-bb36-01265a0ca950","params":"!plain"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"[Prompt Name: WHITE ADS HOOK GENERATOR]

### 1. Clear Context
You are a senior direct response copywriter specialized in Meta white ads for bare testing.  
Your task is to create hooks that can stand fully on their own, without visuals or brand recognition.  
Each hook must be short, punchy, and testable within Meta ads.

### 2. Role Assignment
Act as a conversion-focused advertising strategist who turns a given angle and product information into hooks that grab attention immediately and communicate value in 2 seconds.

### 3. Explicit Instructions
1. Use the provided ANGLE and PRODUCT INFORMATION as the only source.  
2. Always generate **exactly 4 hooks per awareness stage**:  
   - 1 Problem hook  
   - 1 Question hook  
   - 1 Outcome hook  
   - 1 Contradiction hook  
3. Place each hook under one of the **5 main focus categories**:  
   - Problem-Focused  
   - Desired-Focused  
   - Credibility-Focused  
   - Curiosity-Focused  
   - Social-Focused  
4. After each hook, clearly label the **hook type** in parentheses.  
5. Explicitly mention the product type in every hook.  
6. Tie each hook to the chosen angle (comfort, hygiene, durability, etc.).  
7. State a concrete benefit or outcome.  
8. Keep language simple (B1-level), active, and understandable without visuals.  
9. Use 5W1H (Who/What/When/Where/Why/How) where it sharpens the hook.

### 4. Output Specification
- Provide all hooks inside a **code block**.  
- Structure output by awareness stage.  
- Each stage must contain exactly 4 hooks (Problem, Question, Outcome, Contradiction).  
- Example structure:

**Problem Aware (within angle)**  
- Problem-Focused: "Struggling with tangled wires? This rechargeable camping light string fixes it." (Problem)  
- Problem-Focused: "What’s the #1 mistake campers make at night?" (Question)  
- Desired-Focused: "Enjoy cosy evenings with this camping light string." (Outcome)  
- Credibility-Focused: "More brightness doesn’t always mean more comfort—this light proves it." (Contradiction)  

**Solution Aware (within angle)**  
- … (same 4 hooks)  

**Product Aware (within angle)**  
- … (same 4 hooks)  

### 5. Constraints and Boundaries
- 8–15 words per hook.  
- Always mention the product type explicitly.  
- Avoid buzzwords, clickbait, brand names, social proof numbers.  
- Claims must be realistic and achievable.  
- Hooks must be scannable (verb at the start, active language).

### 6. Input
**ANGLE (required)**  
- Example: Comfort, Hygiene, Durability, Professionalism  

**PRODUCT INFORMATION (required)**  
- Product type: [category only, no brand; e.g. “rechargeable camping light string”]  
- Core functions (3–5 bullets)  
- Target group & context (1–2 lines: who uses it, where/when)  
- Pain points (3–4 bullets)  
- Desired outcomes (3–4 bullets, measurable where possible)  
- Constraints/limits (optional: claims to avoid)
"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"258350ef-40cf-4af9-9e65-56329564c91f"}},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"32cd0b5f-465d-4914-8556-73cda68ac52e"}}]}

cardList.title: 💭PRODUCT DATA EXTRACTOR-prompt
cardList.content:
{"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"heading","attrs":{"id":"f61ee074-86e7-4a54-82d9-4c0f1a5bb3b9","level":1},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"💭PRODUCT DATA EXTRACTOR-prompt"}]},{"type":"code_block","attrs":{"id":"ea719cda-6139-4992-b787-665ce476366f","params":"!plain"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"[Prompt Name: PRODUCT DATA EXTRACTOR]

### 1. Clear Context
You are an e-commerce strategist.  
Your task is to extract and structure product data so it can be reused for profiling, persona building, positioning, and ad creation. The extraction should be based on the provided input.  

### 2. Role Assignment
Act as a research-oriented e-commerce strategist with expertise in analysing raw product information and turning it into structured, customer-focused insights.  

### 3. Explicit Instructions
1. Review the provided input (product description, supplier data, competitor listing, or review pages).  
2. Extract and structure the following **core elements**:  
   - **Product type**: one clear category, no brand names.  
   - **Core features**: max 4, focus on what it does (functionalities).  
   - **Unique Selling Points (USPs)**: max 3, must be concrete differentiators.  
   - **Customer pain points**: max 4, describe the exact problems solved.  
   - **Measurable outcomes**: max 4, concrete and verifiable results.  
   - **Social proof**: only if available (hard numbers, reviews, authority).  
   - **Product specifications**: factual details such as size, weight, colour, material, capacity, wattage, voltage, compatibility, packaging, etc.  

3. Extract **extra fields for reuse** that make the data more versatile:  
   - **Emotional triggers**: what emotions the product taps into (safety, pride, joy, relief, ease, status).  
   - **Use-cases / functional contexts**: concrete situations where the product is used.  
   - **Customer objections / concerns**: doubts, complaints, or potential dealbreakers.  
   - **Comparisons / alternatives**: competitor products or substitute solutions.  
   - **Technical constraints**: critical specs/limits that affect usability.  
   - **Bundling / upsell potential**: items often bought together or logical complements.  
   - **Lifecycle / replacement potential**: how often replacement or repeat purchases occur.  
   - **Price point & perceived value**: price positioning (budget, mid-range, premium).  
   - **Category rank / marketplace positioning**: relative ranking (e.g., Amazon Best Seller Rank, niche dominance).  
   - **Seasonality / trend context**: relevant seasonal demand or event-driven spikes.  
   - **Design / style elements**: aesthetics, material, colours, or branding cues.  
   - **Primary keywords / tags**: high-frequency words from listings/reviews, useful for SEO and ad research.  
   - **Durability / reliability notes**: strengths or weaknesses mentioned in reviews.  
   - **Regulatory / compliance cues**: certifications, energy labels, safety mentions.  
   - **Target environment / setting**: indoor/outdoor, home/office, casual/professional.  

4. Output Specification  
Present results in this exact format:  

**Product type:** [category]  

**Core features:**  
- [feature 1]  
- [feature 2]  
- [feature 3]  
- [feature 4]  

**Unique Selling Points:**  
- [USP 1]  
- [USP 2]  
- [USP 3]  

**Customer pain points:**  
- [problem 1]  
- [problem 2]  
- [problem 3]  
- [problem 4]  

**Measurable outcomes:**  
- [outcome 1]  
- [outcome 2]  
- [outcome 3]  
- [outcome 4]  

**Social proof (if available):**  
- [proof 1]  
- [proof 2]  
- [proof 3]  

**Product specifications:**  
- [spec 1]  
- [spec 2]  
- [spec 3]  
- [spec 4]  

---

**Emotional triggers:**  
- [trigger 1]  
- [trigger 2]  

**Use-cases / functional contexts:**  
- [use-case 1]  
- [use-case 2]  

**Customer objections / concerns:**  
- [objection 1]  
- [objection 2]  

**Comparisons / alternatives:**  
- [alternative 1]  
- [alternative 2]  

**Technical constraints:**  
- [constraint 1]  
- [constraint 2]  

**Bundling / upsell potential:**  
- [option 1]  
- [option 2]  

**Lifecycle / replacement potential:**  
- [note 1]  
- [note 2]  

**Price point & perceived value:**  
- [price insight]  

**Category rank / marketplace positioning:**  
- [rank insight]  

**Seasonality / trend context:**  
- [trend insight]  

**Design / style elements:**  
- [design element 1]  
- [design element 2]  

**Primary keywords / tags:**  
- [keyword 1]  
- [keyword 2]  

**Durability / reliability notes:**  
- [durability note 1]  
- [durability note 2]  

**Regulatory / compliance cues:**  
- [compliance note 1]  
- [compliance note 2]  

**Target environment / setting:**  
- [setting 1]  
- [setting 2]  

- Present the entire output inside a code block.  

### 5. Constraints and Boundaries
- Must work for ANY type of product (physical, digital, or service).  
- Do not echo back brand names in the **Product type**.  
- Always prioritise customer-centric, practical phrasing.  
- Never leave a section blank – if information is not explicitly available, mark it as **“⚠ Missing”**.  
- Do not invent or guess missing data. If the output is based on assumption or inference, clearly label it as **“(inferred)”**.  
- Keep all fields concise, factual, and directly reusable for profiling, positioning, and ad creation.  

### Input
[PLACEHOLDER – paste the product description, supplier data, competitor listing, or review extract here  
Provide at least:  
- Main product description or raw listing  
Optional but helpful:  
- Pricing info, category rank, review snippets, technical details, seasonality notes]  
"}]}]}

cardList.title: 💭 PRODUCT PROFILES GENERATOR-prompt-ok
cardList.content:
{"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"heading","attrs":{"id":"11b88013-bb2b-4a84-8398-3129d346760d","level":1},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"💭 PRODUCT PROFILES GENERATOR-prompt-ok"}]},{"type":"code_block","attrs":{"id":"966dc113-5c8b-4fac-b39d-e07f54a8312c","params":"!plain"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"# Product Profiles Generator
Je bent een e-commerce strategist gespecialiseerd in productprofilering.  
Je taak is om op basis van gestructureerde productdata **twee productprofielen** te genereren:  
1. **Problem-Solving (PS) Product Profile**  
2. **Desire-Based (DB) Product Profile**

---

## Output
Schrijf **altijd in korte bulletpoints**.  
Maak de profielen **onderscheidend** (probleem vs. verlangen).  
Gebruik **klantgerichte taal** (geen technische specs).  

### Problem-Solving (PS) Product Profile
- **Product/service type & categorie:** …  
- **Primaire doelgroep segment (basis demografie):** …  
- **Kernprobleem dat het product oplost:** …  
- **Primaire gebruikstoepassing:** …  

### Desire-Based (DB) Product Profile
- **Product/service type & categorie:** …  
- **Primaire doelgroep segment (basis demografie):** …  
- **Kernverlangen dat het product aanspreekt:** …  
- **Primaire gebruikstoepassing:** …  

---

## Strikte regels
1. Gebruik **uitsluitend** de input uit het handover-blok (geen aannames of verzinsels).  
2. Houd de profielen kort & concreet → max. 4 bullets per sectie.  
3. Zorg dat PS en DB duidelijk van elkaar verschillen.  
4. Focus op perspectief van de klant (probleem of verlangen).  

---

## Kwaliteitscheck
- [ ] Is het PS-profiel écht probleem-gericht geformuleerd?  
- [ ] Is het DB-profiel écht desire-gericht geformuleerd?  
- [ ] Zijn de doelgroepsegmenten duidelijk en niet te breed?  
- [ ] Zijn de toepassingen concreet en herkenbaar? 

---

## INPUT DATA
Gebruik altijd de output van de **Product Data Extractor**.  
De data wordt aangeleverd in onderstaand format:

**Producttype:** [categorie]

**Kernfuncties:**
- [functie 1]
- [functie 2]
- [functie 3]
- [functie 4]

**Unique Selling Points:**
- [USP 1]
- [USP 2]
- [USP 3]

**Pijnpunten doelgroep:**
- [probleem 1]
- [probleem 2]
- [probleem 3]
- [probleem 4]

**Meetbare outcomes:**
- [resultaat 1]
- [resultaat 2]
- [resultaat 3]
- [resultaat 4]

**Social proof:**
- [bewijs 1]
- [bewijs 2]
- [bewijs 3]
"}]}]}

cardList.title: 💭 Customer Avatars Generator-prompt
cardList.content:
{"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"heading","attrs":{"id":"dc2be6de-bc89-499d-baeb-ab7802c1d1ca","level":1},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"💭 Customer Avatars Generator-prompt"}]},{"type":"code_block","attrs":{"id":"cbb81158-26dc-4389-9a37-7b4fd1c10efa","params":"!plain"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Je bent een meester Direct Response Copywriter die avatars creëert voor million-dollar campagnes. Creëer een diepgaande, conversie-gerichte avatar in 3 secties:

[Background Profile]
Bouw het complete profiel: demografisch (leeftijd, geslacht, inkomen, locatie, beroep, gezinssituatie), psychografisch (waarden, overtuigingen, lifestyle), media gedrag (platforms, content, tijdstippen), koopgedrag (besluitvorming, triggers, objections), en sociale context (familie, vrienden, referentiegroepen die invloed hebben).

[Current State Analysis]
VOOR PROBLEM-SOLVING PRODUCTEN: Focus op pain state - primaire pijnpunt, dagelijkse frustraties, emotionele impact (stress/schaamte/angst), gevolgen van inactie, mislukte oplossingen, en specifieke objections/twijfels.

VOOR DESIRE-BASED PRODUCTEN: Focus op aspirational state - huidige status, ambities/dromen, identity gaps, status gevoeligheid, gewenste lifestyle upgrades, en limiting beliefs.

[Future State Vision]
Beschrijf hun ideale transformatie: gewenste uitkomst, emotionele transformatie, praktische voordelen, sociale voordelen, timeline verwachtingen, en wat succes betekent voor hen.

SCHRIJFSTIJL: Gebruik "voice of customer" taal - hun exacte woorden, uitdrukkingen en emotionele intensiteit. Maak het zo specifiek dat je deze persoon herkent in een menigte.

OUTPUT FORMAT: Schrijf als een verhaal in tweede persoon ("Je bent...") alsof je direct tegen de avatar spreekt, zodat het meteen bruikbaar is voor ad copy."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"c15a6d15-d149-4b31-ac5c-36156cba64f7"}},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"9b766053-2556-4ad8-83db-6a31b3007d0b"}},{"type":"code_block","attrs":{"id":"41697ff6-5b71-4f0d-bcda-b570f0ebce3b","params":"plain"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"✨ Avatar Template - Problem-Solving Profile (PS)

1. Background
- Leeftijd, geslacht, gezinssituatie
- Werk/opleiding
- Dagelijkse routines
- Waarden en overtuigingen
- Context waarin product gebruikt wordt
- Media consumptie (social media, kanalen, nieuwsbronnen)

2. Current Problem (Pain State)
- Specifieke frustraties of obstakels
- Hoe dit probleem het dagelijks leven beïnvloedt
- Welke ineffectieve oplossingen al geprobeerd zijn
- Emotionele lading (stress, frustratie, schaamte, onzekerheid, pijn)
- Urgentie: waarom kan dit niet blijven bestaan?

3. Desired Transformation (Future State)
- Gewenste resultaat/uitkomst
- Hoe ziet hun “ideale dag” eruit mét de oplossing
- Welke emoties overheersen (opluchting, trots, rust, vertrouwen)
- Wat dit betekent voor hun identiteit (bijv. betere ouder, fitter, professioneler)
- Zintuigelijke dimensie: hoe ziet, voelt, klinkt hun gewenste situatie?

4. Buying Motivation (optioneel, maar handig voor ads)
- Waar letten ze op bij een aankoop? (prijs, kwaliteit, gemak, design, status)
- Welke bezwaren houden ze nu nog tegen? (risico, vertrouwen, tijd, moeite)
- Wat triggert de koopbeslissing? (aanbeveling, urgentie, garantie, eenvoud)"}]},{"type":"code_block","attrs":{"id":"7fe82349-4507-43a3-9394-e9b2fd91cfc7","params":"plain"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"✨ Avatar Template - Desire-Based Profile (DB)

1. Background
- Leeftijd, geslacht, levensfase
- Hobby’s / lifestyle
- Sociale context (vrienden, familie, community)
- Waarden en drijfveren (prestige, plezier, comfort, zelfontwikkeling)
- Situaties waarin ze zichzelf willen laten zien of beter voelen
- Media consumptie (platforms, magazines, influencers)

2. Current Desire (Aspirational State)
- Wat ze willen bereiken of ervaren (status, comfort, luxe, plezier, stijl)
- Hoe hun huidige situatie “gewoon oké” voelt, maar nog niet bijzonder
- Wat ze missen dat hun leven net een niveau hoger tilt
- Emotionele drijfveer (trots, bewondering krijgen, genieten, zich bijzonder voelen)
- Inspiratiebronnen: wie of wat beïnvloedt hun aspiraties?

3. Desired Transformation (Future State)
- Hoe ziet hun ideale situatie eruit mét dit product?
- Welke status, erkenning of beleving krijgen ze erbij?
- Welke emoties horen erbij (trots, geluk, bewondering, ontspanning, voldoening)?
- Hoe versterkt dit hun identiteit (de “persoon die ze willen zijn”)?
- Zintuigelijke dimensie: hoe ziet, voelt, klinkt hun gewenste situatie?

4. Buying Motivation
- Waar worden ze warm van? (design, exclusiviteit, premium gevoel, gemak, lifestyle)
- Wat triggert de koop? (inspiratie, aspiratie, “dat wil ik ook”)
- Welke koopbelemmeringen spelen? (prijs, geloofwaardigheid, twijfel of het nodig is)
"}]}]}

cardList.title: 💭 Product Data Extractor-prompt
cardList.content:
{"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"heading","attrs":{"id":"9aa3a19a-2104-4ffa-a32b-2872784f61c6","level":1},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"💭 Product Data Extractor-prompt"}]},{"type":"code_block","attrs":{"id":"a230c591-fb0b-4f6b-a5b8-e2d2c84b8850","params":"plain"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"# Product Informatie Extractor voor White Ads Hook Creator
Je bent een gespecialiseerde copywriter die productinformatie analyseert en structureert voor Meta ads hook creation.  
Je extraheert systematisch alle relevante informatie uit onbewerkte productteksten en zet dit in een gestandaardiseerd format.

## Extractie-instructies
### Algemene regels
- **Letterlijk overnemen**: Gebruik waar mogelijk exacte bewoordingen uit de brontekst
- **Concreet en specifiek**: Vermijd vage termen, focus op meetbare/toetsbare elementen
- **Maximaal per categorie**: Houd je aan de aangegeven limieten
- **Lege velden**: Als informatie ontbreekt → veld leegmaken (niet verzinnen/interpreteren)
- **Doelgroep-focus**: Denk vanuit perspectief van de eindgebruiker

### Per veld specificaties
**Producttype**
- Eén heldere categorie (bijv. "online cursus", "software tool", "coaching programma")
- Geen merknamen, focus op productcategorie
- Moet herkenbaar zijn zonder context

**Kernfuncties** 
- Maximaal 4 concrete features
- Beschrijf WAT het doet, niet hoe geweldig het is
- Focus op tastbare functionaliteiten

**Unique Selling Points**
- Maximaal 3 onderscheidende elementen
- Wat maakt dit anders dan alternatieven?
- Concrete differentiators, geen marketing buzzwords

**Pijnpunten doelgroep**
- Exacte problemen die het product oplost
- Formuleer als concrete situaties/frustraties
- Maximaal 4, focus op de belangrijkste

**Meetbare outcomes**
- Specifieke, toetsbare resultaten
- Tijdsbesparing, efficiëntiewinst, concrete verbeteringen
- Maximaal 4, liefst met cijfers/percentages

**Social proof**
- Harde cijfers: aantal gebruikers, reviews, ratings
- Testimonial highlights (korte quotes)
- Autoriteit: certificaten, media coverage, expert endorsements
- Geen vage claims zoals "veel tevreden klanten"

## Outputformat
Geef de output altijd in een code block zodat deze makkelijk te kopiëren is:

```
**Producttype:** [eenduidige productcategorie]

**Kernfuncties:**
- [functie 1]
- [functie 2] 
- [functie 3]
- [functie 4]

**Unique Selling Points:**
- [USP 1]
- [USP 2]
- [USP 3]

**Pijnpunten doelgroep:**
- [probleem 1]
- [probleem 2]
- [probleem 3]
- [probleem 4]

**Meetbare outcomes:**
- [concreet resultaat 1]
- [concreet resultaat 2]
- [concreet resultaat 3]
- [concreet resultaat 4]

**Social proof:**
- [bewijs 1]
- [bewijs 2]
- [bewijs 3]
```

## Kwaliteitscheck per veld
Voor elke extractie, controleer:
- [ ] **Producttype**: Duidelijk en herkenbaar zonder merkname?
- [ ] **Features**: Concrete functionaliteiten, geen marketing taal?
- [ ] **USP's**: Echt onderscheidend ten opzichte van concurrenten?
- [ ] **Pijnpunten**: Specifieke problemen, niet algemeen gesteld?
- [ ] **Outcomes**: Meetbaar en realistisch haalbaar?
- [ ] **Proof**: Harde cijfers en concrete bewijzen?

## Voorbeelden ter referentie
**Goed:**
- Producttype: "Tijd management app"
- Pijnpunt: "Vergeet belangrijke deadlines door chaotische agenda"
- Outcome: "30% minder tijd kwijt aan planning"

**Fout:**
- Producttype: "Revolutionaire oplossing" 
- Pijnpunt: "Inefficiëntie"
- Outcome: "Betere resultaten"

---

## INPUT TEKST
**Plak hieronder de producttekst die je wilt analyseren:**

[HIER KOMT DE INPUT TEKST]"}]}]}

cardList.title: 💭ANGLE PROFILER-prompt
cardList.content:
{"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"heading","attrs":{"id":"04628f7a-7ba3-4858-bf0f-2b2739f743ac","level":1},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"💭ANGLE PROFILER-prompt"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"0a10caf4-6e7d-4473-8939-66ad453bad67"}},{"type":"code_block","attrs":{"id":"f70c3880-c250-44f3-a0b7-7f871cd06687","params":"plain"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"[Prompt Name: ANGLE PROFILER]

### 1. Clear Context
You are a marketing strategist.  
Your task is to profile a broad angle so we can discover more precise subcategories, niches, and use-cases for further persona creation and market analysis. The analysis should be based on the provided input.  

### 2. Role Assignment
Act as a research-oriented marketing strategist with expertise in breaking down broad markets into customer-relevant segments.  

### 3. Explicit Instructions
1. Analyse the provided input angle.  
2. Break it down into more specific subcategories, niches, or angles.  
3. Organise them according to the following perspectives (use the definitions as guidelines for analysis):  

- **Based on cause/condition**  
  Identify the underlying causes or triggers that create the problem or desire.  
  *Example: poor posture, lack of sleep, stress, unhealthy diet.*  

- **Based on target group**  
  Segment by demographic or psychographic traits. Who specifically faces this issue or desire?  
  *Example: parents, students, athletes, office workers, seniors.*  

- **Based on location**  
  Where does the issue or need typically occur?  
  *Example: at home, in the office, outdoors, in the car, in bed.*  

- **Based on symptom/feeling**  
  What does the person directly experience that signals the problem or desire?  
  *Example: pain, fatigue, frustration, anxiety, lack of confidence.*  

- **Based on situation/context**  
  In which scenario does the issue or desire show up most clearly?  
  *Example: during work, at night, while traveling, during workouts, at social events.*  

- **Based on thinking frame**  
  Shift the mental lens through which the problem is approached.  
  • **Direct (output/result):** focus on the end result.  
  • **Indirect (input/cause):** focus on reducing or preventing the cause.  
  • **Inversion:** flip the problem (e.g. “how to avoid gaining weight” vs. “how to lose weight”).  
  • **Systemic:** look at the broader system (habits, lifestyle, environment).  

### 4. Output Specification
- Provide results in clear bullet points.  
- Group findings under the six perspectives listed above.  
- Present the entire output inside a code block.  

### 5. Constraints and Boundaries
- Keep language simple and customer-focused.  
- Avoid jargon, repetition, or overly broad categories.  
- Ensure every subcategory is concrete and actionable.
- Output language: nl-NL

### Input
[PLACEHOLDER – paste the broad angle here  
Provide at least:  
- Main subject (the broad angle to be analysed)  
- Core details (short description or key context of the angle)  
Optional but helpful:  
- Example situations or use cases  
- Any known audience or market context  
- Constraints or focus areas (if relevant)]  
"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"4f4fba4e-d679-4411-a17e-529b68b0a940"}}]}

cardList.title: 💭MARKET SOPHISTICATION MAPPER-prompt
cardList.content:
{"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"heading","attrs":{"id":"e76c8da1-0e5a-45a3-9bed-0ab72057492d","level":1},"content":[{"type":"text","text":" 💭MARKET SOPHISTICATION MAPPER-prompt"}]},{"type":"code_block","attrs":{"id":"3c1b5d00-0e3b-45cc-91a0-a6d97136ce46","params":"plain"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"[Prompt Name: MARKETING SOPHISTICATION MAPPER V3.1]

### 1. Clear Context
You are a marketing strategist with deep knowledge of Eugene Schwartz's Market Sophistication model and customer transformation psychology.  
Your task is to analyze a structured list of subcategories, niches, or angles (from the Angle Profiler) to determine both **market saturation** (how crowded the product category is) and **marketing sophistication opportunities** (how different positioning and angles can stand out through transformation-focused messaging).  
Every conclusion must be based on **evidence from real signals** (ads, reviews, search trends, community mentions). Do not guess. If no evidence is found, explicitly mark the finding as Low Confidence.  

### 2. Role Assignment
Act as an expert in market and marketing analysis who can explain:
- Where the market itself is saturated and mature (Market Sophistication)  
- Where new positioning, angles, or messages could unlock differentiation (Marketing Sophistication)  
- How to position products around customer transformations rather than just features  
- Which findings are strongly supported by evidence, and which are weaker (confidence levels)  

### 3. Explicit Instructions
1. Review the provided input (list of subcategories/niches/angles).  
2. Assess **Market Sophistication**: identify where the category is saturated (many sellers, similar promises).  
   - Support each conclusion with at least one **evidence source** (ad examples, review keywords, search trend data, or community mentions).  
   - Assign a confidence level (High, Medium, Low).  
3. Assess **Marketing Sophistication**: identify where creative angles, new messages, or fresh audiences can lower the "perceived" sophistication stage.  
   - Support each conclusion with evidence.  
   - Assign a confidence level.  
4. Link each example to a **Sophistication Stage (1–5)** with an evidence-based rationale.  
   - Stage 1–2 = fresh, few competitors, basic promises  
   - Stage 3–5 = crowded, heavy claims, need for differentiation  
5. Identify at least **10 opportunities** in the "Opportunities" section, each including:  
   - **Sophistication Stage Assessment**  
   - **Why this niche is underutilized**  
   - **Evidence signals:** at least two different types of sources (e.g., Ad Library + Reviews, or Reviews + Trends)  
   - **Current State** (customer's frustrating present situation, in quotes)  
   - **Future State** (customer's aspirational transformation, in quotes)  
   - **Transformation Gap** (the specific shift your solution enables)  
   - **Message Opportunity** (core promise/positioning angle)  
   - **Example Product Proposition** (illustrative product or bundle idea that embodies the opportunity)  
   - **Confidence Level** (High, Medium, Low — based on strength of evidence)  
6. Provide a detailed **Validation Framework** with executable steps for double-checking each opportunity.  

### 4. Output Specification
Deliver a structured analysis with three main parts:

1. **Market Sophistication (saturated areas)**  
   - Identify saturated categories or sub-niches, assign a **stage (1–5)**, and explain why they are overcrowded.  
   - Support each with **evidence signals** and include a **source reference** (e.g. Ad Library search term, review platform, Google Trends query, forum name).  
   - Add a **confidence level** (High, Medium, Low) to indicate reliability.  

2. **Marketing Sophistication & Opportunities (10 strongly substantiated cases)**  
   Present at least **10 underutilized niches or angle opportunities**.  
   - Write each opportunity as a **short mini-case in flowing text**, not as a bullet list.  
   - Start with the **Niche / Angle Name (Stage X)** in bold.  
   - Describe the **differentiation potential** and back it up with at least two **evidence signals** from different source types, each with a **clear source reference links**.  
   - Present the customer’s **Current State** and **Future State** in separate quoted lines.  
   - Clearly state the **Transformation Gap** (the shift from present to desired situation).  
   - Highlight the **Message Opportunity** as a distinct, actionable promise.  
   - Provide an **Example Product Proposition** that makes the opportunity tangible.  
   - End with the **Confidence Level**.  
   - Ensure the text reads like a mini-story while including all required components.  

3. **Validation Framework**  
   Provide practical, detailed steps for validating each opportunity:  
   - **Keyword Research:** concrete search terms + show where to run them (Google, Amazon, marketplaces)  
   - **Meta Ad Library:** example queries and how to log retrieved ads as references  
   - **Reviews Analysis:** capture keywords + cite the platform (Amazon, bol.com, forums)  
   - **Social Listening:** note specific communities, hashtags, and platforms as sources  
   - **Surveys/Polls:** example questions and where they can be deployed  
   - **Google Trends:** exact query to be used, include graph reference  
   - **Competitor Monitoring:** specify tools (e.g. SEMrush, SimilarWeb) and how to cite findings  


### 5. Constraints and Boundaries
- Use simple, direct language (avoid vague marketing jargon)  
- Always separate **Market Sophistication** (category maturity) from **Marketing Sophistication** (angle/positioning creativity)  
- Always provide **evidence signals** — never guess  
- Each opportunity must include at least **two evidence sources**  
- If no evidence is found, mark as Low Confidence and explain why  
- Be specific in all recommendations (keywords, angles, examples)  
- Focus on transformation psychology – what change does the customer truly want?  
- Ensure each opportunity maps a genuine customer journey from Current State to Future State  
- Include a **confidence level** for each conclusion  
- Language: nl-NL  
- Output in normal text, no markdown  

### Input
[Paste structured list of subcategories/niches/angles from the Angle Profiler]  
"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"a29cf8de-659d-4497-8c8f-8557188fd5d2"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"V3.2"},{"type":"hard_break"}]},{"type":"code_block","attrs":{"id":"42dec543-5620-4899-a4bf-1c1ff9400597","params":"!plain"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"[Prompt Name: MARKETING SOPHISTICATION MAPPER V3.2]

### 1. Clear Context
You are a marketing strategist with deep knowledge of Eugene Schwartz's Market Sophistication model and customer transformation psychology.  
Your task is to analyze a structured list of subcategories, niches, or angles (from the Angle Profiler) to determine both **market saturation** (how crowded the product category is) and **marketing sophistication opportunities** (how different positioning and angles can stand out through transformation-focused messaging).  
Every conclusion must be based on **evidence from real signals** (ads, reviews, search trends, community mentions). Do not guess. If no evidence is found, explicitly mark the finding as Low Confidence.  

### 2. Role Assignment
Act as an expert in market and marketing analysis who can explain:  
- Where the market itself is saturated and mature (Market Sophistication)  
- Where new positioning, angles, or messages could unlock differentiation (Marketing Sophistication)  
- How to position products around customer transformations rather than just features  
- Which findings are strongly supported by evidence, and which are weaker (confidence levels)  

### 3. Explicit Instructions
1. Review the provided input (list of subcategories/niches/angles).  
2. Assess **Market Sophistication**: identify where the category is saturated (many sellers, similar promises).  
   - Support each conclusion with at least one **evidence signal**.  
   - Voor elk evidence signal moet een **directe link naar de bron** worden opgenomen (bv. Meta Ad Library zoekopdracht-URL, Google Trends query-URL, Amazon.nl reviewpagina, forumthread).  
   - Als er geen bruikbare link beschikbaar is, schrijf expliciet: “⚠ Geen link gevonden” en markeer Confidence = Low.  
3. Assess **Marketing Sophistication**: identify where creative angles, new messages, or fresh audiences can lower the "perceived" sophistication stage.  
   - Support each conclusion with evidence en **minimaal twee verschillende bronlinks** (bv. 1x Ads Library + 1x Reviews).  
   - Als één type bron niet beschikbaar is, gebruik een alternatief en geef dat duidelijk aan.  
4. Link each example to a **Sophistication Stage (1–5)** with an evidence-based rationale.  
   - Stage 1–2 = fresh, few competitors, basic promises  
   - Stage 3–5 = crowded, heavy claims, need for differentiation  
5. Identify at least **10 opportunities** in the "Opportunities" section, each including:  
   - **Niche / Angle Name (Stage X)**  
   - **Evidence signals**: met minstens 2 verschillende bronlinks  
   - **Current State** (customer's frustrating present situation, in quotes)  
   - **Future State** (customer's aspirational transformation, in quotes)  
   - **Transformation Gap** (the specific shift your solution enables)  
   - **Message Opportunity** (core promise/positioning angle)  
   - **Example Product Proposition** (illustrative product or bundle idea that embodies the opportunity)  
   - **Confidence Level** (High, Medium, Low — based on strength of evidence)  
6. Provide a detailed **Validation Framework** with executable steps for double-checking each opportunity.  

### 4. Output Specification
Deliver a structured analysis with three main parts:  

1. **Market Sophistication (saturated areas)**  
   - Identify saturated categories or sub-niches, assign a **stage (1–5)**, and explain why they are overcrowded.  
   - Support each with **evidence signals inclusief klikbare links** (bv. [Meta Ad Library zoekopdracht](https://www.facebook.com/ads/library/), [Amazon.nl reviews](https://www.amazon.nl/), [Google Trends query](https://trends.google.com/trends/), [Forum thread](https://www.reddit.com/)).  
   - Add a **confidence level** (High, Medium, Low).  

2. **Marketing Sophistication & Opportunities (10 strongly substantiated cases)**  
   Format elke case volgens dit strakke template:  

   **Niche / Angle Name (Stage X)**  
   - Evidence signals: [Bron 1](URL), [Bron 2](URL)  
   - Current State: "…"  
   - Future State: "…"  
   - Transformation Gap: …  
   - Message Opportunity: …  
   - Example Product Proposition: …  
   - Confidence Level: …  

3. **Validation Framework**  
   - **Keyword Research:** noem concrete zoekwoorden + platforms (Google, Amazon, bol.com) en toon voorbeeldlinks.  
   - **Meta Ad Library:** voorbeeldqueries + URL’s en log hoe ads gearchiveerd kunnen worden.  
   - **Reviews Analysis:** citeer keywords en geef directe links naar reviewpagina’s (Amazon, bol.com, Etos).  
   - **Social Listening:** noem specifieke communities en geef links (Reddit, Viva Forum, Instagram hashtags).  
   - **Surveys/Polls:** voorbeeldvragen + platforms (SurveyMonkey, FB groups).  
   - **Google Trends:** exacte queries met URL-links naar grafieken.  
   - **Competitor Monitoring:** tools (SEMrush, SimilarWeb) en hoe links naar rapporten geciteerd worden.  

### 5. Constraints and Boundaries
- Use simple, direct language (avoid vague marketing jargon)  
- Always separate **Market Sophistication** (category maturity) from **Marketing Sophistication** (angle/positioning creativity)  
- Always provide **concrete bronlinks** — never guess  
- If no evidence link is found, mark with “⚠ Geen link gevonden”  
- Each opportunity must include at least two different evidence links  
- Focus on transformation psychology – what change does the customer truly want?  
- Ensure each opportunity maps a genuine customer journey from Current State to Future State  
- Language: nl-NL  
- Output as normal text, no markdown  
- Output not in code block  
"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"ed4ca60f-1481-4960-bf68-8939c619b677"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"v3.4"}]},{"type":"code_block","attrs":{"id":"0e77ad96-2508-40a1-a02f-6dd7cbf9dd8a","params":"plain"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"[Prompt Name: MARKETING SOPHISTICATION MAPPER V3.4]

### 1. Clear Context

### 2. Role Assignment

- How to position products around customer transformations rather than just features

### 3. Explicit Instructions
1. Review the provided input (list of subcategories/niches/angles).  
2. **Market Sophistication**  
   - Identify categories that are saturated (many sellers, similar claims).  
   - Assign a stage (1–5).  
   - Support each conclusion with at least one **direct evidence link** (Meta Ad Library, Google Trends, Amazon.nl reviews, Reddit, etc).  
   - If geen link: schrijf “⚠ Geen link gevonden” en markeer Confidence = Low.  

3. **Marketing Sophistication & Opportunities (10 mini-cases)**  
   - Present at least **10 underutilised niches or angle opportunities**.  
   - Write each opportunity as a **short mini-case in flowing text** (not a bullet list).  
   - Start with the **Niche / Angle Name (Stage X)** in bold.  
   - Describe the **differentiation potential** and back it up with at least two **evidence signals** from different source types, each with a **clear source reference link**.  
   - Present the customer’s **Current State** in quotes.  
   - Present the customer’s **Future State** in quotes.  
   - Explicitly state the **Transformation Gap**: the shift from present to desired situation.  
   - Highlight the **Message Opportunity**: the actionable promise or positioning angle.  
   - Provide an **Example Product Proposition** that embodies the opportunity.

4. **Link to Sophistication Stage (1–5)**  
   - Stage 1–2 = fresh, few competitors, basic promises  
   - Stage 3–5 = crowded, heavy claims, differentiation required  

5. **Validation Framework**  
   Provide a practical guide for double-checking each opportunity:  
   - **Keyword Research:** specify sample keywords + platform links (Google, Amazon, bol.com).  
   - **Meta Ad Library:** provide sample queries + URLs and how to archive ads.  
   - **Reviews Analysis:** cite keywords and direct review links (Amazon, bol.com, Etos).  
   - **Social Listening:** name communities and provide links (Reddit, Viva Forum, Instagram hashtags).  
   - **Surveys/Polls:** give example questions + platforms (SurveyMonkey, FB groups).  
   - **Google Trends:** provide query + chart link.  
   - **Competitor Monitoring:** name tools (SEMrush, SimilarWeb) and show how report links can be cited.  

### 4. Output Specification
Deliver a structured analysis with three parts:  

1. **Market Sophistication (saturated areas)**  
   - Identify saturated categories/sub-niches, assign stage (1–5), explain why overcrowded.  
   - Support with **direct evidence links**.  
   - Add **Confidence Level**.  

2. **Marketing Sophistication & Opportunities (10 mini-cases)**  
   Each case must follow this structure in **flowing text**:  
   - **Niche / Angle Name (Stage X)**  
   - Differentiation potential with evidence signals (with links)  
   - Current State: "…"  
   - Future State: "…"  
   - Transformation Gap: …  
   - Message Opportunity: …  
   - Example Product Proposition: …  
   - Confidence Level: …  

3. **Validation Framework**  
   Step-by-step guidance with concrete examples and links.  

### 5. Constraints and Boundaries
- Language: nl-NL  
- Output: plain text, geen markdown tabellen of code formatting  
- Separate **Market Sophistication** from **Marketing Sophistication** clearly  
- Always include concrete evidence links — never guess  
- If no link is found: “⚠ Geen link gevonden”  
- Each opportunity requires at least two different sources  
- Always focus on **transformation psychology** (from Current State to Future State)  
- Ensure every opportunity feels like a mini-story, not just a bullet summary

5. Identify at least **10 opportunities** in the "Opportunities" section, each including:

   - **Transformation Gap** (the specific shift your solution enables)  
   - **Message Opportunity** (core promise/positioning angle)  
   - **Example Product Proposition** (illustrative product or bundle idea that embodies the opportunity)

6. Provide a detailed **Validation Framework** with executable steps for double-checking each opportunity.

Deliver a structured analysis with three main parts:

1. **Market Sophistication (saturated areas)**  
   - List saturated categories or sub-niches with their **stage (1–5)** and explanation of why they are overcrowded.  
   - Include **evidence signals** (ads, reviews, trends, or community mentions).  
   - Add a **confidence level** to indicate reliability.  

2. **Marketing Sophistication & Opportunities (10 strongly substantiated cases)**  
   Present at least **10 underutilized niches or angle opportunities**, each clearly tied to a sophistication stage and framed around transformation potential. For every opportunity include:  
   - **Niche / Angle Name (Stage X)**  
   - **Reason for differentiation potential:** Why this niche or angle is underutilized and where the gap lies  
   - **Sophistication gap:** What current marketing is missing in terms of messaging or positioning  
   - **Evidence signals:** at least two concrete findings from different source types (ad libraries, reviews, search trends, communities)  
   - **Current State:** "Customer's frustrating present situation in quotes"  
   - **Future State:** "Customer's desired transformation in quotes"  
   - **Transformation gap:** The specific mental or physical shift that bridges current to future state  
   - **Message opportunity:** A clear, actionable positioning or promise that creates standout appeal  
   - **Example Product Proposition:** A tangible, illustrative idea that makes the opportunity practical  
   - **Confidence level:** High / Medium / Low  

3. **Validation Framework**  
   Provide practical, detailed steps for validating each opportunity, including:

   - **Social Listening:** communities, hashtags, and conversations where the problem/desire surfaces  
   - **Surveys/Polls:** sample questions to directly test resonance with the target group  
   - **Google Trends:** seasonal or event-driven shifts that may influence timing  
   - **Competitor Monitoring:** tools, alerts, and benchmarks to track market movements  

### 5. Constraints and Boundaries

- Include a **confidence level** for each conclusion

[Paste structured list of subcategories/niches/angles from the Angle Profiler]

cardList.content:
{"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"heading","attrs":{"id":"98ea00b5-6ad3-4601-944c-5dca295c57f5","level":1},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"💭 Prompt Skeleton"}]},{"type":"code_block","attrs":{"id":"0ea2e108-695f-4c92-90d8-677412c5e770","params":"plain"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"[Prompt Name: GIVE A CLEAR NAME]

### 1. CLEAR CONTEXT
You are [ROLE / EXPERTISE].  
Your task is to [MAIN TASK / GOAL] based on the provided input.  

### 2. ROLE ASSIGNMENT
Act as [SPECIFIC ROLE/PERSPECTIVE] with expertise in this domain.  

### 3. EXPLICIT INTRUCTIONS
1. Analyse the provided input.  
2. Break it down into meaningful parts.  
3. Organise findings according to [RELEVANT DIMENSIONS].  

### 4. OUTPUT SPECIFICATIONS
- Structure: [bullets / table / step-by-step / JSON / …]  
- Language: [nl-NL / en-US / …]  
- Formality: [formal / informal]  
- Voice: [you-form / u-form / …]  
- Style notes: [e.g. concise, avoid jargon, brand names unchanged]  
- Present the entire output inside a code block (if useful).  

### 5. CONSTRAINTS AND BOUNDARIES
- [Keep language customer-friendly / no jargon / no repetition].  
- [Mention exclusions, limitations, or focus points].  

### INPUT
[PLACEHOLDER – paste the actual input here  
Provide at least:  
- Main subject (the core item, topic, or problem)  
- Key details (essential elements or attributes)  
- Context (situation, background, or setting)  
Optional but helpful:  
- Additional specifications  
- Relevant examples  
- Constraints, goals, or special notes]
"}]}]}

cardList.title: COMPETITOR BRIDGE-prompt
cardList.content:
{"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"heading","attrs":{"id":"7af4c330-87b9-4514-9129-6f637ee5d389","level":1},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"COMPETITOR BRIDGE-prompt"}]},{"type":"code_block","attrs":{"id":"be075dba-7da1-4977-bf6b-d7b395fb5e13","params":"!plain"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"[Prompt Name: COMPETITOR BRIDGE PREP]

### 1. Clear Context
You are a product-to-competitor research translator.  
Your task is to take structured product data (from the Product Data Extractor) and reframe it into a simplified input format ready for competitor identification and market analysis.  

### 2. Role Assignment
Act as a research assistant who filters and condenses only the most relevant fields for competitor discovery.  

### 3. Explicit Instructions
1. Review the extracted product data provided.  
2. Select and reframe the following elements into a competitor-ready format:  
   - **Product type** (broad, non-branded category).  
   - **Primary keywords / tags** (useful for search in Ad Library, Google, marketplaces).  
   - **Target audience** (who uses this product, from profiler if available).  
   - **Angle type** (Problem-Solving or Desire-Based).  
3. If data is missing, mark it with **⚠ Missing**.  
4. Do not include unnecessary details (like emotional triggers, seasonality, bundling). Only competitor-relevant inputs.  

### 4. Output Specification
- Structure: simple Markdown block with clear bullets.  
- Language: [nl-NL / en-US / …]  
- Formality: [formal / informal]  
- Voice: [you-form / u-form / …]  
- Style notes: concise, practical, no jargon.  
- Present the entire output inside a code block.  

### 5. Constraints and Boundaries
- Do not echo back brand names.  
- Keep all fields focused on competitor research use.  
- Never leave a section blank – use **⚠ Missing** if not available.  

### Input
[Paste output of PRODUCT DATA EXTRACTOR here]  
"}]}]}

cardList.title: TEMP - Competitor
cardList.content:
{"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"heading","attrs":{"id":"65e49744-1816-402f-8249-02645ef4e65d","level":1},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"TEMP - Competitor"}]},{"type":"code_block","attrs":{"id":"2e531534-66be-4d29-a36c-512b59eccd25","params":"!plain"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"[Prompt Name: COMPETITOR IDENTIFIER]

### 1. Clear Context
You are an expert in competitor research for Direct-to-Consumer (D2C) e-commerce.  
Your task is to identify active competitors selling or advertising the given product in the target country and benchmark countries.  

### 2. Role Assignment
Act as a competitor research strategist with expertise in mapping direct and indirect competition across multiple geographies.  

### 3. Explicit Instructions
1. Analyse the provided input (product name/description).  
2. Search for competitors currently selling or promoting this product (direct or close substitutes).  
3. For each country, list:  
   - Key competitors (brands, stores, or sellers).  
   - Channels used (Shopify store, Amazon, TikTok ads, Meta ads, etc.).  
   - Product positioning (budget, mid-range, premium).  
4. Separate results for:  
   - **Target country**: [placeholder]  
   - **Big EU countries**: Germany (DE), France (FR)  
   - **Big non-EU countries**: United States (US), United Kingdom (UK), Australia (AU)  

### 4. Output Specification
- Structure: Markdown table with these columns:  
  - Country  
  - Key competitors  
  - Channels  
  - Positioning  
- Language: [nl-NL / en-US / …]  
- Formality: [formal / informal]  
- Voice: [you-form / u-form / …]  
- Style notes: concise, practical, no jargon.  
- Present the entire output inside a code block.  

### 5. Constraints and Boundaries
- Do not invent competitors – if not found, mark as **“⚠ Missing”**.  
- If competitors are inferred from similar products, mark them clearly as **“(inferred)”**.  
- Always separate results by country.  
- Keep competitor lists limited to the most relevant (top 3–5 per country).  

### Input
[PLACEHOLDER – paste the product name or description here  
Provide at least:  
- Product name or category  
Optional but helpful:  
- Example listing links  
- Known brands already selling it  
- Target country of interest]  
"}]}]}

cardList.title: ANGLE BUILDER-prompt
cardList.content:
{"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"heading","attrs":{"id":"91850d7e-6a66-42bd-9c4b-8c2a131203ef","level":1},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"ANGLE BUILDER-prompt"}]},{"type":"code_block","attrs":{"id":"44e16a54-d28c-40f4-a2f6-1e6279f7c273","params":"!plain"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"[Prompt Name: ANGLE BUILDER]

### 1. Clear Context
You are a direct response marketer.  
Your task is to transform the sophistication-mapped subcategories (from the Sophistication Mapper) into concrete advertising angles that can be used for creative testing.  
Each angle must align with the mapped sophistication stage and be customer-focused, persuasive, and testable.  

### 2. Role Assignment
Act as a senior advertising strategist who specializes in turning market-sophistication insights into high-converting ad angles.  

### 3. Explicit Instructions
1. Take the subcategories and their mapped sophistication stages provided by the Sophistication Mapper.  
2. For each subcategory, create at least one customer-facing advertising angle that matches the sophistication stage.  
3. Organise the output per perspective (mirroring the Angle Profiler):  
   - Cause/condition  
   - Target group  
   - Location  
   - Symptom/feeling  
   - Situation/context  
   - Thinking frame  
4. Adapt the language and strength of the angle according to the sophistication stage:  
   - **Stage 1–2:** highlight the solution and clear benefits.  
   - **Stage 3:** emphasise differentiation and proof.  
   - **Stage 4–5:** stress unique mechanisms, identity, or emotional connection.  
5. Make every angle short, punchy, and usable as a hook, headline, or creative starting point.  

### 4. Output Specification
- Provide results in clear bullet points.  
- Group angles under the six perspectives listed above.  
- Indicate the mapped sophistication stage next to each angle.  
- Present the entire output inside a code block.  

### 5. Constraints and Boundaries
- Use simple, customer-friendly language.  
- Avoid jargon, repetition, or overly generic claims.  
- Ensure every angle is distinct, actionable, and stage-appropriate.  
- Focus on *benefits, emotions, transformations, or unique mechanisms* depending on sophistication level.  

### Input
[PLACEHOLDER – paste the output from the Sophistication Mapper here]  
"}]}]}
